b05a13c9-62e9-5877-af07-8e709ecfa10b.name: Charge
b05a13c9-62e9-5877-af07-8e709ecfa10b.description: If the aatxe moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: If the aatxe moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

505ce378-0af8-5b77-bf79-0daffd4d94df.name: Know Thoughts
505ce378-0af8-5b77-bf79-0daffd4d94df.description: The aatxe can use an action to read the surface thoughts of one creature within 30 feet. This works like the detect thoughts spell, except it can only read surface thoughts and there is no limit to the duration. It can end this effect as a bonus action or by using an action to change the target. Limited Speech (Humanoid Form Only). The aatxe can verbally communicate only simple ideas and phrases, though it can understand and follow a conversation without issue.

b54f2cee-3231-508f-b2d0-404462e40d3b.name: Magic Resistance
b54f2cee-3231-508f-b2d0-404462e40d3b.description: The aatxe has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The aatxe has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

443b5f51-4def-555b-92da-5379e349d81e.name: Shapechanger
443b5f51-4def-555b-92da-5379e349d81e.description: The aatxe can use its action to polymorph into a Medium male humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

1ea54a63-addb-558c-acb4-22392a252f15.name: Bulwark
1ea54a63-addb-558c-acb4-22392a252f15.description: The aatxe flares crimson with celestial power, protecting those nearby. The next attack that would hit an ally within 5 feet of the aatxe hits the aatxe instead.

attributes.description: The aatxe flares crimson with celestial power, protecting those nearby. The next attack that would hit an ally within 5 feet of the aatxe hits the aatxe instead.

876a7a2f-6a2e-5e51-82fa-2b4283553e88.description: The aatxe makes one gore attack.

attributes.description: The aatxe makes one gore attack.

7e80a185-0342-56f5-9cf5-2ea3da551cab.name: Gore (Aatxe)
7e80a185-0342-56f5-9cf5-2ea3da551cab.description: The aatxe makes one gore attack.

345f03fd-c077-580b-bf0f-194672138150.name: Paw the Earth
345f03fd-c077-580b-bf0f-194672138150.description: The aatxe lowers its horns and paws at the ground with its hooves. Each creature within 30 feet of the aatxe must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the aatxe's Paw the Earth for the next 24 hours.

fe54512c-d71b-551f-82b6-32f588721881.name: Explosive Death
fe54512c-d71b-551f-82b6-32f588721881.description: When the ant is reduced to 0 hp, it explodes in a burst of acid. Each creature within 5 feet of the ant must succeed on a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw or take 5 (2d4) acid damage.

5d5c217b-06bd-5930-b773-1511b04e3e0a.name: Keen Smell
5d5c217b-06bd-5930-b773-1511b04e3e0a.description: The ant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The ant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

dacbd1ee-16fc-5089-9df2-bffc806e7b93.name: Acid Spit
dacbd1ee-16fc-5089-9df2-bffc806e7b93.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (2d4) acid damage and the target takes 1 acid damage at the start of its next turn unless the target immediately uses its reaction to wipe off the spit.

7e45ba37-3fe0-55c3-b61b-dd218426bf4c.name: Ethereal Sight
7e45ba37-3fe0-55c3-b61b-dd218426bf4c.description: The dragon can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.

attributes.description: The dragon can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.

f63f216f-9935-56fa-abd7-b59cc5e7d319.name: Illumination
f63f216f-9935-56fa-abd7-b59cc5e7d319.description: The dragon sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

attributes.description: The dragon sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

8f3c4c18-d02c-5468-9d14-90bd3c37f8b0.name: Incorporeal Movement
8f3c4c18-d02c-5468-9d14-90bd3c37f8b0.description: The dragon can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The dragon can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

7b51e14b-e7d5-55c0-b08b-f977dded7113.name: Legendary Resistance (3/ Day)
7b51e14b-e7d5-55c0-b08b-f977dded7113.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

b08fd03a-7122-58d3-a61d-02d3122c75cc.name: Void Traveler
b08fd03a-7122-58d3-a61d-02d3122c75cc.description: The light dragon travels from star to star and does not require air, food, drink, or sleep. When flying between stars, the light dragon magically glides on solar winds, making the immense journey through the void in an impossibly short time.

attributes.description: The light dragon travels from star to star and does not require air, food, drink, or sleep. When flying between stars, the light dragon magically glides on solar winds, making the immense journey through the void in an impossibly short time.

c7ffe309-f07a-5e06-8ed3-e80ac8162cb1.name: Breath Weapon
c7ffe309-f07a-5e06-8ed3-e80ac8162cb1.description:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons:
Radiant Breath. The dragon exhales radiant energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Flaring Breath. The dragon emits a flash of dazzling light from its maw in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or be blinded. Undead within the area of effect must also make a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or be turned for 1 minute. Undead of CR 2 or lower who fail the saving throw are instantly destroyed.

017583f7-56dc-5e5b-b6c2-25b1ff127077.name: Frightful Presence
017583f7-56dc-5e5b-b6c2-25b1ff127077.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

65cd19d2-9fca-5b14-b151-bad948788d5b.name: Clockwork Encasement
65cd19d2-9fca-5b14-b151-bad948788d5b.description:
The creature within the machine is a somewhat shapeless mass, both protected and given concrete manipulators by its armor. The clockwork armor has a variety of manipulators that the ahu-nixta can use to attack or to interact with objects outside of the armor. When the ahu-nixta is reduced to 0 hp, its clockwork armor breaks and the ahunixta exits it. Once out of its armor, the creature's pulpy mass no longer receives the benefits of the listed Damage or Condition Immunities, except for psychic and prone.

Without its clockwork armor, the ahu-nixta has the following statistics: AC 12, hp 37 (5d10 + 10), Strength 9 (-1), and all its modes of travel are reduced to 20 feet. In addition, it has no attack actions, though it can still cast its spells. The ahu-nixta's body can form eyes, mouths, and grabbing appendages. Its grabbing appendages can pick up objects and manipulate them, but the appendages can't be used for combat. The ahu-nixta's extra appendages can open and close glass-covered viewing ports in the clockwork armor, requiring no action, so it can see and interact with objects outside the armor.

The ahu-nixta can exit or enter its clockwork armor as a bonus action.

f980453d-ad79-597c-9c88-7ad776dbc495.name: Immutable Form
f980453d-ad79-597c-9c88-7ad776dbc495.description: The clockwork armor of the ahu-nixta is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form, as is the creature that controls it as long as the ahu-nixta remains within the armor.

f9a9def0-3747-5d79-8589-f39470de81a7.name: Innate Spellcasting
f9a9def0-3747-5d79-8589-f39470de81a7.description:
The ahu-nixta's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). The ahu-nixta can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
At will: fear, fire bolt (2d10), telekinesis

4620cac9-1103-5e91-bc49-aa98475d37f3.name: Multiattack (Ahuizotl)
4620cac9-1103-5e91-bc49-aa98475d37f3.description: The ahuizotl can use its Tail Grab. It then makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claw.

attributes.description: The ahuizotl can use its Tail Grab. It then makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claw.

0c6fab84-9668-5e70-8d17-83b752ac0647.name: Tail Grab
0c6fab84-9668-5e70-8d17-83b752ac0647.description:
The ahuizotl grabs a creature or item. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be grappled (escape DC 14). The ahuizotl can then move up to its speed as a bonus action. The grappled creature must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pulled along 5 feet behind the ahuizotl. A creature being dragged by the ahuizotl makes attack rolls and Dexterity saving throws with disadvantage.

If the target is an object or weapon being held by another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw, or the ahuizotl pulls the object away from the creature. After stealing an object or weapon, the ahuizotl can move up to its speed as a bonus action. The ahuizotl can only grapple one creature or hold one weapon or object at a time. If holding a weapon, it can use its Tail Grab action to make one attack with the weapon with no proficiency bonus

a01b5f14-021a-5ea5-9adf-fdebdf54acc5.description: A good-aligned creature who takes a short rest within 10 feet of an alabaster tree gains all the benefits of a long rest.

0c9964b2-db2c-5863-80f4-063bc718733a.name: Cloud of Needles
0c9964b2-db2c-5863-80f4-063bc718733a.description: (Pine Only) The alabaster tree fires a cloud of sharp needles at all creatures within 30 feet of it. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

64ea64ae-6ce8-5865-8d4a-cd9a8da6b0d2.name: Multiattack (Alabaster Tree)
64ea64ae-6ce8-5865-8d4a-cd9a8da6b0d2.description: The alabaster tree makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The alabaster tree makes two slam attacks.

a0f9e62f-be01-5bcc-a322-64cfa6eeb864.name: Serrated Squeeze
a0f9e62f-be01-5bcc-a322-64cfa6eeb864.description:
The alabaster tree makes one slam attack against a Large or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is engulfed in razor-sharp leaves, and the grapple ends. While engulfed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside of the leaves, and it takes 13 (3d8) slashing damage at the start of each of the alabaster tree's turns. An alabaster tree can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

If the alabaster tree takes 15 damage or more on a single turn from the engulfed creature, the alabaster tree must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or release the creature in a shower of shredded leaves. The released creature falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the alabaster tree. If the alabaster tree dies, an engulfed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the leaves and branches by using an action to untangle itself.

If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

d574bb87-0ba2-5c35-9309-e746eb4c002f.name: Alchemical Infusion
d574bb87-0ba2-5c35-9309-e746eb4c002f.description:
Syringes on the golem's back pierce its silver hide and infuse it with a powerful admixture. At the start of its turn, the alchemical golem can select one of the following infusions. Each infusion lasts until the start of its next turn. The golem can't use multiple infusions at once.
Brimstone: The golem takes 7 (2d6) necrotic damage when it activates this infusion. The golem can breathe poison as an action. In addition, any creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the golem must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of the creature's next turn.
Quicksilver: The golem takes 14 (4d6) necrotic damage when it activates this infusion. The golem's silver hide turns to shifting quicksilver, increasing its speed to 40 feet and granting it resistance to damage to which it is not already immune. l
Salt: The golem takes 17 (5d6) necrotic damage when it activates this infusion. The golem's silver hide is covered with salt crystals, increasing its AC by 3. The golem's slam attacks deal an extra 14 (4d6) piercing damage and the ground within 20 feet of the golem becomes difficult terrain for 1 hour. A creature can force an adamantine syringe into the golem's body with a successful DC 25 Strength check while grappling the golem, nullifying its current infusion and dealing 35 (10d6) piercing damage to it.

df1f6736-8e0e-5737-9b33-9d3732c39d16.name: Alchemical Arrows
df1f6736-8e0e-5737-9b33-9d3732c39d16.description:
As a bonus action, the archer attaches an alchemy tube to the shaft of one arrow before firing its longbow. On a successful hit, the alchemy tube shatters and does one of the following:
Concussive. The target takes an extra 18 (4d8) thunder damage and must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
Entangling. The target takes an extra 18 (4d8) acid damage and is restrained by sticky, alchemical goo. As an action, the restrained target can make a DC 16 Strength check, bursting through the goo on a success. The goo can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; immunity to piercing, slashing, poison, and psychic damage).
Explosive. The target takes an extra 18 (4d8) fire damage and catches on fire, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can end this damage by using its action to make a DC 16 Dexterity check to extinguish the flames.

08b6a333-bc16-55c9-8523-7786e428469d.name: Plant Camouflage
08b6a333-bc16-55c9-8523-7786e428469d.description: The alliumite has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

attributes.description: The alliumite has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks it makes in any terrain with ample obscuring plant life.

ecf12a34-d343-5ad9-b6f2-2ff580daea64.name: Tearful Stench
ecf12a34-d343-5ad9-b6f2-2ff580daea64.description: Each creature other than an alliumite within 5 feet of the alliumite when it takes damage must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of the creature's next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the Tearful Stench of all alliumites for 1 minute.

d06734ba-10a1-5f08-b8b2-9329b7542c0a.name: Grass Blade
d06734ba-10a1-5f08-b8b2-9329b7542c0a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

a74c7d06-7d73-50bd-a3ff-26e314e04b95.name: Thorn Dart
a74c7d06-7d73-50bd-a3ff-26e314e04b95.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage.

0b5b9ecd-9c86-5ff6-809d-c3cf1d0f6754.name: Skin of the Forge
0b5b9ecd-9c86-5ff6-809d-c3cf1d0f6754.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the alnaar must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that touches the alnaar or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 (2d6) fire damage. Nonmagical weapons and objects with Armor Class 15 or lower are immediately destroyed after coming into contact with the alnaar's skin. Weapons that hit the alnaar deal their damage before being destroyed. This trait is suppressed if the alnaar is starving.

Weapons that hit the alnaar deal their damage before being destroyed. This trait is suppressed if the alnaar is starving.

65d61dc2-af68-5794-9d1f-e2b809ac088d.name: Starving Wrath
65d61dc2-af68-5794-9d1f-e2b809ac088d.description: If an alnaar hasn't fed on a Medium-sized or larger creature within the last 12 hours, it is starving. While starving, the alnaar's Armor Class is reduced by 2, it has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all of its hp, and will direct its attacks at a single foe regardless of tactical consequences. Once it feeds on a Medium-sized or larger corpse or brings a Medium-sized or larger creature to 0 hp, it is no longer starving.

41cfa731-17b4-5350-a16b-b774595e3e5d.name: Fiery Fangs
41cfa731-17b4-5350-a16b-b774595e3e5d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage and 3 (1d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage and 3 (1d6) fire damage.

a683b6ea-8744-5bd8-b0e9-dd383c7efdda.name: Flare
a683b6ea-8744-5bd8-b0e9-dd383c7efdda.description: The alnaar becomes super-heated, expelling momentous energy outwards in a 20-foot radius blast around it. Each creature caught in the blast must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 22 (4d10) fire damage and 22 (4d10) force damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the fire and force damage but isn't knocked prone. The fire ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried. After using Flare, the alnaar is starving. It can't use Flare if it is starving.

0c77351f-6717-5cae-bd23-24150c23293d.name: Multiattack (Alnaar)
0c77351f-6717-5cae-bd23-24150c23293d.description: The alnaar makes three fiery fangs attacks.

attributes.description: The alnaar makes three fiery fangs attacks.

0cc413a2-6956-5839-aa6f-8a11234eb8da.name: On the Hunt
0cc413a2-6956-5839-aa6f-8a11234eb8da.description: When a creature the alnaar can see moves, the alnaar can move up to 20 feet toward the moving creature. If the alnaar moves within 10 feet of that creature, it can make one fiery fangs attack against the creature.

2e52b03f-018e-55e4-a88e-466731294287.name: Innate Spellcasting (Alp)
2e52b03f-018e-55e4-a88e-466731294287.description:
The alp's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). The alp can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: invisibility (self only)
3/day each: silent image, sleep
1/day each: bestow curse, dream

1/day each: bestow curse, dream

084d9013-d280-5bc3-964c-1fb1d1fd65fd.name: Shadow Stealth
084d9013-d280-5bc3-964c-1fb1d1fd65fd.description: While in dim light or darkness, the alp can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

attributes.description: While in dim light or darkness, the alp can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

25f293f2-40a5-5c6b-a16c-c69aa5e8a562.name: Shapechanger (Alp)
25f293f2-40a5-5c6b-a16c-c69aa5e8a562.description: The alp can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Tiny beast it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

f419607f-4391-5b38-9a3f-9ebdc22b581e.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
f419607f-4391-5b38-9a3f-9ebdc22b581e.description: While in sunlight, the alp has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the alp has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

749033a3-293b-565f-862a-00d5ad6650c0.name: Sleeper's Slap
749033a3-293b-565f-862a-00d5ad6650c0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and, if the target was sleeping or unconscious before it was hit, it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened and restrained for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the restrained condition on itself on a success. The creature must succeed on another saving throw on a following round to end the frightened condition.

321e4ec1-cae5-5c06-b0de-578d038f6402.name: Magic Resistance (Alpha Yek)
321e4ec1-cae5-5c06-b0de-578d038f6402.description: The yek has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

9cfafc2a-1e44-5319-93a2-fa5fde0736b6.name: Pack Tactics
9cfafc2a-1e44-5319-93a2-fa5fde0736b6.description: The yek has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the yek's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

919efe1b-c2bf-5d9b-94b5-23d8f3acedd6.name: Bite (Alpha Yek)
919efe1b-c2bf-5d9b-94b5-23d8f3acedd6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) piercing damage.

e4242fb6-8e28-50fa-b6c2-274ce0c99514.name: Bone Shard
e4242fb6-8e28-50fa-b6c2-274ce0c99514.description:
Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage and the target must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a piece of the bone breaks and sticks in the target's wound. The target takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns as long as the bone remains lodged in its wound. A creature, including the target, can take its action to remove the bone by succeeding on a DC 15 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The bone also falls out of the wound if the target receives magical healing 

A yek typically carries 3 (1d6) bone shards, which are destroyed on a successful hit. It can use its action to tear a bone shard from a corpse within 5 feet. Derro

2040fb01-d77c-5486-9823-872e14e4b3bf.name: Multiattack (Alpha Yek)
2040fb01-d77c-5486-9823-872e14e4b3bf.description: The alpha yek makes one bite attack and two claw attacks. It can make a bone shard attack in place of a claw attack if it has a bone shard available.

d12700d0-ca54-52d2-9caf-6a3f35ee628a.name: Aversion to Water
d12700d0-ca54-52d2-9caf-6a3f35ee628a.description: If the golem takes cold damage or is doused with at least three gallons of water, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: If the golem takes cold damage or is doused with at least three gallons of water, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

1945961e-3dc1-5af8-9c18-0415a4ee63d7.name: Death Burst
1945961e-3dc1-5af8-9c18-0415a4ee63d7.description: When the altar flame golem is reduced to 0 hp, it explodes into shards of hot stone and fire. Each creature within 15 feet of it must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. An altar flame golem is not immune to the fire damage of another altar flame golem's death burst and doesn't absorb it.

cfa391c3-ba3f-5b84-bf76-e861363422d2.name: False Appearance
cfa391c3-ba3f-5b84-bf76-e861363422d2.description: While the golem remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an altar bearing an eternal flame.

attributes.description: While the golem remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an altar bearing an eternal flame.

981bd643-abed-5c93-adb7-c294b34d6156.name: Fire Absorption
981bd643-abed-5c93-adb7-c294b34d6156.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the fire damage dealt. me

1ffd0b7e-3a59-5be0-af8e-70d7e7b391f5.name: Flame Breath
1ffd0b7e-3a59-5be0-af8e-70d7e7b391f5.description: The golem breathes fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

35f5f903-1d2a-5141-9be2-3e3d2a733f1c.name: Multiattack (Altar Flame Golem)
35f5f903-1d2a-5141-9be2-3e3d2a733f1c.description: The altar flame golem makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The altar flame golem makes two slam attacks.

f6c0f155-12c6-53b5-a2ee-1aeae56fe45e.name: Slam (Altar Flame Golem)
f6c0f155-12c6-53b5-a2ee-1aeae56fe45e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) fire damage.

200fc73d-9f6f-5371-a0f1-b157a268a90d.name: Judging Aura
200fc73d-9f6f-5371-a0f1-b157a268a90d.description: An undead creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the ammut must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the ammut's Judging Aura for the next 24 hours.

210d3844-6c86-5752-9db6-4e068b1696cc.name: Magic Resistance (Ammut)
210d3844-6c86-5752-9db6-4e068b1696cc.description: The ammut has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ammut has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

7e01b138-4237-5985-ae18-44d6a4b47e45.name: Prison Belly
7e01b138-4237-5985-ae18-44d6a4b47e45.description: The large belly of the ammut magically sustains the life of those trapped inside it. A creature caught in its belly doesn't need food, water, or air. The ammut can maintain one Medium or smaller creature this way as long as the ammut remains alive.

attributes.description: The large belly of the ammut magically sustains the life of those trapped inside it. A creature caught in its belly doesn't need food, water, or air. The ammut can maintain one Medium or smaller creature this way as long as the ammut remains alive.

27a58fd8-7f1d-5175-956f-eb9a8b810cea.name: Absorb Spirit
27a58fd8-7f1d-5175-956f-eb9a8b810cea.description: The ammut attempts to absorb the spirit of a dead or undead creature in its belly. The creature must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be absorbed by the ammut. A creature absorbed this way is destroyed and can't be reanimated, though it can be restored to life by powerful magic, such as a resurrection spell. The ammut regains hp equal to the absorbed creature's hp maximum.

b904400c-b243-59da-af17-a43240875664.name: Bite (Ammut)
b904400c-b243-59da-af17-a43240875664.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (5d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) radiant damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and the ammut can't bite another target.

If the target is Large or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and the ammut can't bite another target.

90d17962-f4e6-5796-ad14-3a0830bd0c2c.name: Ghost Breath
90d17962-f4e6-5796-ad14-3a0830bd0c2c.description: The ammut inhales the tortured spirits of undead within 30 feet. Each undead creature of CR 1 and lower in the area is automatically destroyed. All other undead must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

attributes.description: The ammut inhales the tortured spirits of undead within 30 feet. Each undead creature of CR 1 and lower in the area is automatically destroyed. All other undead must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated for 1 minute. 821293af-2408-53ee-b9de-3d2e33515486.name: Swallow
821293af-2408-53ee-b9de-3d2e33515486.description:
The ammut makes one bite attack against a Large or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained and it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the ammut. An ammut can only have one Medium or smaller creature swallowed at a time.

If the ammut takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the ammut must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the ammut. If the ammut dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone.

5e6f5d5f-d3c5-5b67-b671-fe2e45723d32.name: Illumination (Ancient Light Dragon)
5e6f5d5f-d3c5-5b67-b671-fe2e45723d32.description: The dragon sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet.

29b2df93-bc39-5ce8-9cdd-bf847d4a5f62.name: Breath Weapon (Ancient Light Dragon)
29b2df93-bc39-5ce8-9cdd-bf847d4a5f62.description:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons:
Radiant Breath. The dragon exhales radiant energy in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw, taking 77 (14d10) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Flaring Breath. The dragon emits a flash of dazzling light from its maw in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 23 Constitution saving throw or be blinded. Undead within the area of effect must also make a DC 23 Wisdom saving throw or be turned for 1 minute. Undead of CR 3 or lower who fail the saving throw are instantly destroyed.

22cec4bd-4dd5-5fa8-960b-24313578cc1b.name: Frightful Presence (Ancient Light Dragon)
22cec4bd-4dd5-5fa8-960b-24313578cc1b.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 23 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

7baf7c40-c31f-53e4-ba10-f3ac88d300ab.name: Wing Attack (Ancient Light Dragon)

11d441d3-d623-5097-a830-4d59223266ca.name: Siege Monster
11d441d3-d623-5097-a830-4d59223266ca.description: The ancient mandriano deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The ancient mandriano deals double damage to objects and structures.

bb127f49-4e2e-5c75-8953-cf23d2e8dea5.name: Call the Dead
bb127f49-4e2e-5c75-8953-cf23d2e8dea5.description: The ancient mandriano animates one humanoid corpse within 60 feet. This works like the animate dead spell, except it only creates zombies and the zombies. The mandriano can control up to twenty zombies at one time.

attributes.description: The ancient mandriano animates one humanoid corpse within 60 feet. This works like the animate dead spell, except it only creates zombies and the zombies. The mandriano can control up to twenty zombies at one time.

f91836fe-2fd4-55fc-9210-d1ef4468012e.name: Consume the Spark
f91836fe-2fd4-55fc-9210-d1ef4468012e.description: The mandriano drains the essence of one grappled target. The target must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the mandriano regains hp equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. A humanoid slain in this way rises 24 hours later as a zombie or skeleton under the mandriano's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The mandriano can control up to twelve undead at one time.

fc0013b8-6b11-58fc-b42a-434a64f04d21.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 20 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

14e06fd4-844e-5d4e-a1d4-85d14a7b655b.name: Aura of Necromancy's Bane
14e06fd4-844e-5d4e-a1d4-85d14a7b655b.description: Necromancy spells can't be cast within 120 feet of the ankou. When an undead creature starts its turn within 30 feet of the ankou, it must make a DC 22 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: Necromancy spells can't be cast within 120 feet of the ankou. When an undead creature starts its turn within 30 feet of the ankou, it must make a DC 22 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

c7eaaa0b-4250-5b68-9bf5-ca84653995e6.name: Cloak of Ghostly Shadows
c7eaaa0b-4250-5b68-9bf5-ca84653995e6.description:
As a bonus action while in dim light or darkness, the ankou becomes invisible. While invisible, the ankou has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks and gains the following:
Resistance to acid, cold, fire, lighting, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.
Immunity to the grappled, paralyzed, petrified, prone, and restrained conditions
The ankou can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
The cloak of ghostly shadows ends when the ankou chooses to end it as a bonus action, when the ankou dies, or if the ankou ends its turn in bright light.

bf280f9b-cb61-51b1-8cb8-471678a421af.name: Change Shape
bf280f9b-cb61-51b1-8cb8-471678a421af.description: The ankou magically polymorphs into any beast, humanoid, or undead creature it has seen before that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (the ankou's choice). Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form and it doesn't gain any class features or legendary actions of the new form.

f9d6a1d3-18f6-5702-8273-e2cca6ab7491.description: The ankou learns the location of all living creatures within 120 feet. Alternatively, it can learn the location of all undead creatures or creatures that have been dead no longer than 1 hour within 1 mile.

8afb70b5-4729-54ed-ad20-07923c982151.description: The ankou moves up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks. Any creature whose space it moves through must make a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

08b82bef-9a2a-54d2-9c53-fb5f2a951595.description: Each creature of the ankou's choice that is within 120 feet of it must make a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, its speed is reduced to 0 for 1 minute. If the save fails by 5 or more, the creature is instead paralyzed for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the ankou's Horrifying Presence for the next 24 hours.

cce96583-73d3-5ddb-b181-81b9288b146d.description: The ankou can use its Horrifying Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

2310d8fc-1e59-54ec-951a-5c464d96716f.name: Reaper's Breath
2310d8fc-1e59-54ec-951a-5c464d96716f.description: The ankou exhales cold fire in a 120-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in that area must make a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Undead creatures automatically fail the saving throw and treat all damage dealt by this breath weapon as radiant instead of cold.

2b72ebff-fafd-5528-8f85-b56b330e0ab5.description: The ankou can transport itself and up to eight creatures in contact with it to another plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except dead or incorporeal creatures can be transported and don't have to be willing. The ankou can't use this ability to banish an unwilling creature.

d6caba1f-7619-5697-aa36-982a27ffbccc.name: Bite (Anophiloi)
d6caba1f-7619-5697-aa36-982a27ffbccc.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, the anophiloi attaches to it. While attached, the anophiloi doesn't attack. Instead, at the start of each of the anophiloi's turns, the target loses 5 (1d6 + 2) hp due to blood loss.

The anophiloi can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. It does so after it drains 20 hit points of blood from the target or the target dies. A creature, including the target, can use its action to detach the anophiloi by succeed on a DC 13 Strength check.

dc244f48-3ec1-5535-b16c-1b6f3a9b5a2c.name: Thorn Vine

Until this grapple ends, the target takes 7 (2d6) acid damage at the start of each of the arborcyte's turns, and tendril attacks against the target have advantage. The arborcyte can grapple up to two creatures at one time.

dd5eee54-a329-52a3-b3bd-881e4df0ce2a.name: Camouflage
dd5eee54-a329-52a3-b3bd-881e4df0ce2a.description: While attached to a host, the arcamag has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

attributes.description: While attached to a host, the arcamag has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

c44c2a9f-4d7f-5926-bfdb-40f2c7e2fd41.name: Shapechanger (Arcamag)
c44c2a9f-4d7f-5926-bfdb-40f2c7e2fd41.description: The arcamag can use its action to polymorph into a small object, such as a ring, wand, orb, rod, or scroll. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies. False Appearance (Object Form Only). While motionless, the arcamag is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies. False Appearance (Object Form Only). While motionless, the arcamag is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

1a8d99f3-61c1-5f99-99cd-7929a23dfde6.name: Attach
1a8d99f3-61c1-5f99-99cd-7929a23dfde6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature that can cast spells. Hit: The arcamag attaches to the target. While attached, the arcamag doesn't attack. Instead, it causes a handful of changes in its spellcaster host (see Changes to the Host sidebar). The arcamag can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. A creature other than the host can use its action to detach the arcamag by succeeding on a DC 15 Strength check. The host can use its action to detach the arcamag only after the host has expended all of its spell slots for the day, including the extra cantrips and spell slots gained from having the arcamag attached. Doing so doesn't require a Strength check. When the arcamag detaches itself or is detached from a host, the host takes 2 (1d4) psychic damage per spellcaster level.

e184bad8-f335-597d-83cc-9aeb87a48f73.name: Teleport
e184bad8-f335-597d-83cc-9aeb87a48f73.description: The arcamag magically teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space. If it is attached to a host when it uses this action, it automatically detaches.

7e0e2b54-b835-5bf7-aa77-a3196bba92aa.name: Arcane Discharge
7e0e2b54-b835-5bf7-aa77-a3196bba92aa.description: When an arcanaphage dies, it explodes in a surge of partially-digested magical energy. Each creature within 5 feet per Feed score must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 3 (1d6) force damage per Feed score on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. For 1 minute afterward, the affected area is awash with volatile magic. A creature that starts its turn in the affected area takes 7 (2d6) force damage.

f3598ad8-080f-5f9d-934b-3cd1a9df1b0b.name: Hunger
f3598ad8-080f-5f9d-934b-3cd1a9df1b0b.description: Each time it feeds in combat, it regains hp equal to twice the level of the spell it ate and increases its Feed score by 1. The arcanaphage can't have a Feed score higher than 8, and its Feed score reduces by 1 each time it finishes a long rest.

9e8aa31b-3b9c-5be0-9f65-435bbdf51dd6.name: Ingest Magic
9e8aa31b-3b9c-5be0-9f65-435bbdf51dd6.description: At the start of each of the arcanaphage's turns, each creature within 30 feet of it that is currently maintaining concentration on a spell must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature's spell ends and the arcanaphage feeds.

e2c20848-9db8-5a20-8792-33b13a9a7eb2.name: Magic Immunity
e2c20848-9db8-5a20-8792-33b13a9a7eb2.description: The arcanaphage is immune to damage from spells. It has advantage on saving throws against all other magical effects.

cbe120b2-c28a-538f-834e-c53fcb0f9dd6.name: Voracious
cbe120b2-c28a-538f-834e-c53fcb0f9dd6.description: The arcanaphage's tentacles glow when a spell is cast within 30 feet of it, countering the spell. This reaction works like the counterspell spell, except the arcanaphage must always make a spellcasting ability check, no matter the spell level. Its ability check for this is +5. If it successfully counters the spell, the arcanaphage feeds.

f8bf8826-c5fd-5341-92c3-026982cb4521.description: The archaeopteryx doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

3f04d7a6-63a0-5d75-b103-6cd8c9010167.name: Armory Exploit
3f04d7a6-63a0-5d75-b103-6cd8c9010167.description: The objects that make up the golem's body can be removed or destroyed. With the exception of the slam attack, an attacker can choose to disable one of the armory golem's attacks on a critical hit. Alternatively, the attacker can attempt to destroy the golem's focus instead of disabling one of its attacks.

7469c450-39fa-54f0-9c3d-d7c670968cd2.name: Focus Weakness
7469c450-39fa-54f0-9c3d-d7c670968cd2.description: A creature grappling the armory golem can take its action to remove the golem's focus by succeeding on a DC 15 Strength check. If its focus is removed or destroyed, the armory golem must make a DC 8 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of its turns. On a success, the golem continues working properly, but it repeats the saving throw the next round at 1 higher DC. On a failure, the golem dies, falling into a heap of armaments.

7df4c8ee-c5dc-5a23-9330-afe4a4949ef4.name: Shield Wall
7df4c8ee-c5dc-5a23-9330-afe4a4949ef4.description: The golem reconfigures its construction, moving shields and armor to encase its body. It regains 10 hp, and its AC increases by 2 until the end of its next turn.

89cb1fd1-e321-57a4-99d6-0d010eb212dc.name: Astral Devour
89cb1fd1-e321-57a4-99d6-0d010eb212dc.description:
A creature hosting an astral snapper's astral form must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw each time it finishes a long rest. On a success, the astral snapper is ejected from the host and the Astral Plane into an unoccupied space in the Material Plane within 10 feet of the host and is stunned for 1 round. On a failure, the astral snapper consumes part of the host's internal organs, reducing the host's Constitution score by 1d4. The host dies if this reduces its Constitution to 0. The reduction lasts until the host finishes a long rest after the astral snapper has been expelled. If the host's Constitution score is reduced to 0, the astral snapper exits the host's body in the Material Plane by tearing its way out through the abdomen. The astral snapper becomes completely corporeal as it exits the host, stepping out of the host at its full size.

From the time the astral snapper succeeds on the initial dive into the host through the Astral Plane until the moment it emerges from the host's abdomen, it can be seen by any creature that can see into the Astral Plane-its head buried in the host's back. The astral snapper has disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and is effectively stunned when in this position until it takes damage.

8eae7a88-84de-56b4-83c8-c0cadb7b093a.name: Multiattack (Astral Snapper)
8eae7a88-84de-56b4-83c8-c0cadb7b093a.description: The astral snapper makes two attacks with its claws. If both attacks hit the same target, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or its wound becomes a rift to the Astral Plane. The astral snapper immediately passes through, closing the rift behind it. The target is then affected by the astral snapper's Astral Devour trait.

9dff3c0a-cf1f-5bf8-96a1-ea0de74693d1.name: Absorbent
9dff3c0a-cf1f-5bf8-96a1-ea0de74693d1.description: When the avatar damages a creature, it absorbs a portion of that creature's knowledge and power. As a bonus action, it can recreate any action available to a creature it damaged within the last minute. This includes spells and actions with limited uses or with a recharge. This recreated action is resolved using the avatar's statistics where applicable.

10495bde-7a28-569b-896e-c760686f81f3.name: Amorphous (Avatar of Shoth)
10495bde-7a28-569b-896e-c760686f81f3.description: The avatar, including its equipment, can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

31978e6a-0d3c-50af-92e5-dfa04ef92170.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
31978e6a-0d3c-50af-92e5-dfa04ef92170.description:
The avatar's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell casting DC 21, +13 to hit with spell attacks). It may cast the following spells innately, requiring no components:
At will: acid splash (4d6), light, spare the dying, true strike
3/day each: bless, blur, command, darkness, enthrall, shield
2/day each: counterspell, dispel magic
1/day each: black tentacles, confusion

aa680352-d52c-515d-bffc-af935fbe5e13.description: Any creature hostile to the avatar that starts its turn within 30 feet of the avatar must succeed on a DC 20 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on all attack rolls until the end of its next turn. Creatures with Intelligence 3 or lower automatically fail the saving throw.

9af34010-b08b-5ca7-88f0-4baff06ddf37.name: At Will Spell

56606863-c9a6-5cd6-a28f-008cc1ec24ec.name: Consult the Zom
56606863-c9a6-5cd6-a28f-008cc1ec24ec.description: The avatar uses its action to consult its weighty zom for insight. The zom flashes brilliant crimson-and-white light. Each creature within 120 feet who can see the avatar must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn. Each creature of the avatar's choice within 120 feet that speaks a language must succeed on a DC 20 Charisma saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn as the avatar telepathically utters a short expression that is particularly meaningful to that creature.

ab41487f-5d5e-5820-8910-3dd238266c16.name: Legendary Merge
ab41487f-5d5e-5820-8910-3dd238266c16.description: A shoth with less than half its maximum hp can merge with any other shoth creature within 10 feet, adding its remaining hp to that creature's. The hp gained this way can exceed the normal maximum of that creature. The avatar can accept any number of such mergers.

898debe2-c8c0-5057-b45a-e0a0321bbca7.name: Ear-Splitting Yawp
898debe2-c8c0-5057-b45a-e0a0321bbca7.description: The azeban emits a piercing yell in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 21 (6d6) thunder damage and is deafened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage but isn't deafened. A creature made of inorganic material such as stone, crystal, or metal has disadvantage on this saving throw. A nonmagical object that isn't being worn or carried also takes the damage if it's in the area.

cbc93230-9f9a-5edf-b847-be16d79b454a.name: Control Weather
cbc93230-9f9a-5edf-b847-be16d79b454a.description: Azi Dahaka can alter the weather in a 5-mile radius centered on itself. The effect is identical to the control weather spell, except the casting time and effects are immediate. Call Lightning (Cost 2 Actions). A bolt of lightning flashes down from the clouds to a point Azi Dahaka can see within 100 feet of it. Each creature within 5 feet of that point must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

2d614d0c-b5d9-5734-8af3-17f148247dad.name: Storm Breath
2d614d0c-b5d9-5734-8af3-17f148247dad.description: Azi Dahaka exhales a blast of wind and lightning in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 22 (4d10) bludgeoning damage and 18 (4d8) lightning damage, is pushed 25 feet away from Azi Dahaka, and is knocked prone. On a success, a target takes half the bludgeoning and lightning damage and is pushed, but isn't knocked prone. All nonmagical flames in the cone are extinguished.

32fa0949-abcd-5c4d-bda8-1f96541dfd74.description: Azi Dahaka beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw or take 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. Azi Dahaka can then fly up to half its flying speed.

b6b67287-167b-54a9-99e8-7366c291a3c2.name: Liquid Courage (Recharge 5-6)
b6b67287-167b-54a9-99e8-7366c291a3c2.description: As a bonus action, the bar brawl imbibes nearby alcohol to gain access to a hidden reservoir of audacity and grit. The bar brawl gains 7 (2d6) temporary hp for 1 minute.

f1fcdaa1-9bcb-5bfc-a24e-cafb60f1f380.description: The bar brawl can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the bar brawl can move through any opening large enough for a Medium humanoid. Except for Liquid Courage, the bar brawl can't regain hp or gain temporary hp.

ab27e81d-5eb8-5610-bfd3-8f93425a2cbf.name: Divine Command
ab27e81d-5eb8-5610-bfd3-8f93425a2cbf.description: Barong roars a command at one allied undead or celestial within 30 feet of him. It can move up to its speed and make one attack as a reaction. The creature doesn't provoke an opportunity attack from this movement. Bats Bats exist in hundreds of species, from the harmless messenger bats of the ghoul empire to the ravening blood-devouring vampire bats found in various castles and deep jungles. The giant albino bat and the giant vampire bat are two monsters that vex adventurers more often than most, and they are often allies of darakhul, werebats, dhampirs, and vampires.

c0299524-21bc-5e70-b1fa-c959a49f31c0.name: Summon Spirit
c0299524-21bc-5e70-b1fa-c959a49f31c0.description: Barong can summon any combination of 2d4 good-aligned ghosts, uraeuses or couatls; 1d4 temple dogs, unicorns, or good-aligned wraiths; or one buraq or deva. The spirits and celestials appear in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet of Barong and act as his allies. They remain for 1 minute or until Barong dismisses them as an action.

229e3357-e19f-57c1-83fa-b8c19815c68e.description:
The bathhouse drake's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: create or destroy water, misty step, prestidigitation
3/day each: control water, fog cloud, gaseous form, lesser restoration

823d5cd1-f652-5a7f-8ed6-35af33e8f6bc.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) fire damage.

44669dd5-8962-5c8b-804e-9d45491832dd.name: Steam Burst
44669dd5-8962-5c8b-804e-9d45491832dd.description: The bathhouse drake creates a burst of hot steam. Each creature within 20 feet of it must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 14 (4d6) fire damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a target takes half the damage but isn't blinded. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

3ad127d5-0226-548a-81e1-31f6b5cf3a19.name: Frenzy (1/rest)
3ad127d5-0226-548a-81e1-31f6b5cf3a19.description: As a bonus action, the bearfolk can trigger a berserk frenzy that lasts 1 minute. While in frenzy, it gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks and has advantage on attack rolls. Attack rolls made against a frenzied bearfolk have advantage.

3fdef750-fc03-5bf9-981e-5ff0d864504b.description: If the bearfolk moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a battleaxe attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the bearfolk can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.

594f6629-c0e7-5316-9e62-2a36bb889a41.name: Leadership
594f6629-c0e7-5316-9e62-2a36bb889a41.description: For 1 minute, the bearfolk chieftain can, as a reaction, utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 feet of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a d4 to its roll, provided it can hear and understand the bearfolk chieftain. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the bearfolk chieftain is incapacitated.

While the weapon is stuck, it can't be used. A creature can pull the weapon free by taking an action to make a DC 13 Strength check and succeeding.

0127730b-62a2-5946-baaa-36053a50f058.name: Spellcasting
0127730b-62a2-5946-baaa-36053a50f058.description:
The priestess is a 6th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). The priestess has the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): guidance, mending, resistance, sacred flame
- **1st Level** (4 slots): bane, command, cure wounds, detect magic
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): augury, spiritual weapon
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): animate dead, bestow curse, spirit guardians

754d13c4-22f1-5fc1-8ba9-bb44a70624af.name: Coagulate
754d13c4-22f1-5fc1-8ba9-bb44a70624af.description: Each time the elemental takes cold damage, its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

7b00eb3a-efea-526b-be1f-3a1381ea4f6b.name: Destroyed by Water
7b00eb3a-efea-526b-be1f-3a1381ea4f6b.description: If the blood elemental becomes entirely submerged in water, it dissipates and dies instantly.

attributes.description: If the blood elemental becomes entirely submerged in water, it dissipates and dies instantly.

5b6e3244-0368-5f57-9772-767b008d928e.name: Liquid Form
5b6e3244-0368-5f57-9772-767b008d928e.description: The elemental can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

f94a84f4-b7ad-588e-8365-a31d4cf5eef1.name: Blood Drain
f94a84f4-b7ad-588e-8365-a31d4cf5eef1.description:
Each creature in the elemental's space must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 10 (3d6) necrotic damage and, if it is Large or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 13). A grappled creature is restrained and unable to breathe. If the saving throw is successful, the creature is pushed out of the elemental's space. The elemental can grapple one Large creature or up to two Medium or smaller creatures at one time.

At the start of the elemental's turn, each target grappled by it takes 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. A creature within 5 feet of the elemental can use its action to make a DC 15 Strength check, freeing a grappled creature on a success. When Blood Drain deals 30 or more necrotic damage, the elemental grows in size as though affected by an enlarge/reduce spell. This increase in size lasts until the blood elemental finishes a long rest.

435f9df7-2973-5d5a-a021-9469bea52e16.name: Blood Sense (Blood Giant)
435f9df7-2973-5d5a-a021-9469bea52e16.description: A blood giant can pinpoint the location of living creatures within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of living creatures within 1 mile of it.

bb844c93-5682-5d75-81f2-080cf6502fab.name: Magic Weapons (Blood Giant)
bb844c93-5682-5d75-81f2-080cf6502fab.description: The blood giant's weapon attacks are magical.

57ae5db6-47f9-5177-bbc9-e20375b8f77a.name: Blood Magic
57ae5db6-47f9-5177-bbc9-e20375b8f77a.description:
The blood giant uses one of the following:
Impale. The blood giant causes 10-foot-high blood spikes to burst from the ground within 15 feet of it. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 26 (4d12) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Drown. The blood giant sends blood pouring down the throat of one creature within 30 feet, which must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature is incapacitated until the end of its next turn as it coughs up the blood and is poisoned for 1 minute after that.
Vaporize. A red mist surrounds the blood giant in a 20-foot-radius sphere. The mist spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It moves with the blood giant and doesn't impede the giant's vision. The mist dissipates after 1d4 rounds.

Vaporize. A red mist surrounds the blood giant in a 20-foot-radius sphere. The mist spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It moves with the blood giant and doesn't impede the giant's vision. The mist dissipates after 1d4 rounds.

fe33da60-422e-5036-9c4f-de7192c1fafc.name: Blood Drain
fe33da60-422e-5036-9c4f-de7192c1fafc.description: A creature that touches the ooze or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) necrotic damage and the ooze gains temporary hp equal to that amount as it drains blood from the victim. It can add temporary hp gained from this trait to temporary hp gained from its pseudopod attack and Overflow reaction. Its temporary hp can't exceed half its maximum hp. If the ooze takes radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the ooze's next turn, although it retains any temporary hp it previously gained.

eff1530e-57f6-59ba-a6c9-71a1cebb89a5.name: Spider Climb
eff1530e-57f6-59ba-a6c9-71a1cebb89a5.description: The ooze can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

3368f880-5282-5c63-9434-5f2ab445db36.name: Overflow
3368f880-5282-5c63-9434-5f2ab445db36.description: When the blood ooze is hit with a melee attack, it can drain blood from the attacker. The attacker must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 11 (2d10) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The ooze gains temporary hp equal to the necrotic damage taken.

0468f902-107e-5c4c-9875-88efb8c2a869.name: Blood Drain (Blood Zombie)
0468f902-107e-5c4c-9875-88efb8c2a869.description: A creature that touches the zombie or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) necrotic damage and the zombie gains temporary hp equal to that amount as it drains blood from the victim. If the zombie takes radiant damage or damage from a magic weapon, this trait doesn't function at the start of the zombie's next turn, although it retains any temporary hp it previously gained. It can add temporary hp gained from this trait to temporary hp gained from its slam attack. Its temporary hp can't exceed half its maximum hp.

3fa135d9-6eb9-5599-b53a-bf570dc5db0c.name: Undead Fortitude
3fa135d9-6eb9-5599-b53a-bf570dc5db0c.description: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hp, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 hp instead.

248ae904-7b2c-5ac8-8712-4f7fa752b7c9.name: Horrific Imitation
248ae904-7b2c-5ac8-8712-4f7fa752b7c9.description: The bloody bones chooses one creature it can see. It moves, acts, and speaks in a macabre imitation of the creature. Its utterances are nonsense, and it can't understand the languages of its chosen target. It maintains this imitation until it dies. A creature that hears and sees the bloody bones can tell it is performing an imitation with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

2054c402-bac8-59a6-a364-1469cfda4f29.name: Horrifying Aura
2054c402-bac8-59a6-a364-1469cfda4f29.description: Any creature hostile to the bloody bones that starts its turn within 10 feet of the bloody bones must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to the bloody bones' Horrifying Aura for the next 24 hours.

5d4f2044-4960-5514-bbeb-7aa50ba2847b.name: Dark Stare
5d4f2044-4960-5514-bbeb-7aa50ba2847b.description: The bloody bones stares balefully at one creature it can see within 60 feet. That creature must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on all attacks until the end of its next turn.

cd06d10d-ce65-5493-9374-d2cfc594e3f7.name: Its Crown Runs Red
cd06d10d-ce65-5493-9374-d2cfc594e3f7.description: When it is hit by an attack, the bloody bones regains 5 (1d10) hit points and has resistance to that damage type until the end of its next turn as life-giving blood pours from the top of its skull.

62a23c63-8010-5d06-9993-9277313a4b30.name: Multiattack (Bloody Bones)
62a23c63-8010-5d06-9993-9277313a4b30.description: The bloody bones makes two claw attacks. It can use its Dark Stare in place of one claw attack.

attributes.description: The bloody bones makes two claw attacks. It can use its Dark Stare in place of one claw attack.

7eb1855d-626e-5abd-a5b2-4bb56617342b.name: Berserk
7eb1855d-626e-5abd-a5b2-4bb56617342b.description:
Whenever the bone golem starts its turn with 30 hp or fewer, roll a d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object, usually an object smaller than itself. Once the golem goes berserk, it continues to attack until it is destroyed or it regains all its hp. 

The golem's creator, if within 60 feet of the berserk golem, can calm it by speaking firmly and persuasively. The golem must be able to hear its creator, who must take an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check. If the check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk. If it takes damage while still at 30 hp or fewer, the golem might go berserk again.

6f3d208c-327b-52ee-88aa-a9b379914f15.name: Bone Shard (Bone Golem)
6f3d208c-327b-52ee-88aa-a9b379914f15.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

26891487-1337-513f-b71d-d6ec8a07e9cc.name: Claw (Bone Golem)
26891487-1337-513f-b71d-d6ec8a07e9cc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

248baf60-919b-5c24-8fcf-a2e4c875e1a7.name: Multiattack (Bone Golem)
248baf60-919b-5c24-8fcf-a2e4c875e1a7.description: The bone golem makes two attacks.

attributes.description: The bone golem makes two attacks.

97e0fc6c-2aa3-588a-8865-e6d27d90167b.name: Between the Lines
97e0fc6c-2aa3-588a-8865-e6d27d90167b.description: As a bonus action while within 30 feet of its book, the bookkeeper can hop inside its book. While inside its book, the bookkeeper has a flying speed of 30 feet and is indistinguishable from ink on a page.

attributes.description: As a bonus action while within 30 feet of its book, the bookkeeper can hop inside its book. While inside its book, the bookkeeper has a flying speed of 30 feet and is indistinguishable from ink on a page.

c1e466aa-8c92-52f6-9145-7faed42cdb5c.name: Book Bound
c1e466aa-8c92-52f6-9145-7faed42cdb5c.description: A bookkeeper makes all attacks, saving throws, and skill checks with advantage when its creator is within 60 feet of its book. The bookkeeper's hp maximum is reduced by 1 for every minute it is further than 60 feet from its book. When its hp maximum reaches 0, it dies. If its creator dies, the bookkeeper can be convinced to pass ownership of the book to a new creature if the creature succeeds on a DC 13 Charisma check. The new owner becomes the bookkeeper's new “creator” and inherits the bookkeeper along with the book.

4afaadbc-0a46-5f7b-a686-1883b7453097.name: Disintegrate
4afaadbc-0a46-5f7b-a686-1883b7453097.description: When the bookkeeper dies, the book it is bound to is also destroyed.

61b61d26-d325-5380-bff3-b5fae483028f.name: Bite (Bookkeeper)
61b61d26-d325-5380-bff3-b5fae483028f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 1 poison damage.

bbdd0639-5892-58d9-8907-4512ba03d47f.name: Elusive Pages
bbdd0639-5892-58d9-8907-4512ba03d47f.description: While inside its book, the bookkeeper magically turns its book invisible until it attacks, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). The bookkeeper is also invisible while inside the invisible book

5ad435a7-b1a5-5bab-9115-24ffa0def7ae.name: Ink Splash
5ad435a7-b1a5-5bab-9115-24ffa0def7ae.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) poison damage and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

d80b09b0-5f99-55ec-bba6-9254c798aeec.name: Adhesive
d80b09b0-5f99-55ec-bba6-9254c798aeec.description: The boot grabber adheres to anything that touches it. A Large or smaller creature adhered to the boot grabber is also grappled by it (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage.

1e2ae606-d05b-50d4-877f-7a91dda166c4.name: Amorphous (Boot Grabber)
1e2ae606-d05b-50d4-877f-7a91dda166c4.description: The boot grabber can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The boot grabber can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

8e2e7f70-7b7d-5408-bd94-2c47826eee41.name: False Appearance (Boot Grabber)
8e2e7f70-7b7d-5408-bd94-2c47826eee41.description: While the boot grabber remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a dirty puddle of water.

599d5ce7-e4a7-53ac-a531-a4b39657338b.name: Adhesive Hands
599d5ce7-e4a7-53ac-a531-a4b39657338b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage and the target is subjected to its Adhesive trait. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the boot grabber can't make adhesive hands attacks against other targets.

754c73db-0d0f-5691-9076-6db2fd6cd7d3.name: Unearthly Hum
754c73db-0d0f-5691-9076-6db2fd6cd7d3.description: The boot grabber targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. It emits a high frequency humming noise which can only be heard by the target. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or move toward the boot grabber on its turn by the shortest and most direct route, ending its turn when it comes within 5 feet of the boot grabber.

79db59a7-357e-5cea-9caa-623373034c9a.name: Boiling Body
79db59a7-357e-5cea-9caa-623373034c9a.description: The golem's body is hot to the touch, thanks to the boiler inside its chest. A creature that touches the golem or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage.

attributes.description: The golem's body is hot to the touch, thanks to the boiler inside its chest. A creature that touches the golem or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage.

31ce6fcb-eee1-5ce1-831e-827c7c3b5069.name: Brazen Bull
31ce6fcb-eee1-5ce1-831e-827c7c3b5069.description: The golem makes a slam attack against a target it is grappling as it opens a plate in its chest and exposes its arcane boiler. If the attack hits, the target is forced into the golem's boiler, and the grapple ends. While inside the boiler, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the boiler, and it takes 14 (4d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. To escape, it or another creature must succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check to open the boiler, freeing the target, which falls prone in a space within 5 feet of the golem. A bronze golem can only have one creature in its boiler at a time.

64f3a891-4fc5-558d-872f-5cecac5050e5.description: When the cacus giant dies, it exhales a final breath of divine essence in a gout of intense fire. Each creature within 5 feet of it must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 27 (6d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

b0ded7eb-d229-5f1f-8f54-4ccc689a5466.description: As a bonus action, the carbuncle can cause its garnet to glow or not. While glowing, the garnet sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.

Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

004d4e6f-a936-5137-aa09-5acaed0498b7.name: Feline Terror
004d4e6f-a936-5137-aa09-5acaed0498b7.description: Each creature in the swarm must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or fall prone and become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the swarm's Feline Terror for the next 24 hours.

beb60446-3e35-578d-9d6c-073b5704e1e5.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny cat. The swarm can't regain hp or gain temporary hp.

ead51a0d-3256-54f6-8bc4-06a8c79a393a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 0 ft., up to two creatures in the swarm's space. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage, or 7 (2d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.

fe3d98d2-153e-5741-9703-3917d81ae8c5.name: Consumption
fe3d98d2-153e-5741-9703-3917d81ae8c5.description: As a bonus action, a cauldronborn can consume one potion within 5 feet of it that is not being worn or carried. Along with the potion's effect, the cauldronborn's hp maximum increases by 3 (1d6) and it gains the same number of hp.

bcbcf86b-3cae-5679-8f47-d1108f18aa2c.description: The cauldronborn can pinpoint the location of potions and magic items within 60 feet of it. Outside of 60 feet, it can sense the general direction of potions within 1 mile of it.

2a312432-e7e5-5262-9e5b-d23a1434a8b0.name: Sprint
2a312432-e7e5-5262-9e5b-d23a1434a8b0.description: The cauldronborn triples its speed until the end of its turn when moving toward a potion it has detected.

9ad0e0d9-5b41-5ac5-8ff4-6a8af3e2b2a0.name: Call Potion
9ad0e0d9-5b41-5ac5-8ff4-6a8af3e2b2a0.description: The cauldronborn releases a hungry screech, magically reaching out to nearby potions. All potions within 10 feet of the cauldronborn magically move toward the cauldronborn by rolling out of backpacks, hopping off of belts, unburying themselves, etc. A creature wearing or carrying a potion must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or its potion moves to within 5 feet of the cauldronborn. The target must make a separate saving throw for each potion it is attempting to keep in its possession.

The centaur chieftain rears back on its hind legs and makes a powerful stomp with its hooves. Each creature within 15 feet of the chieftain must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The attack leaves the centaur chieftain vulnerable, reducing its
Armor Class by 2 until the start of its next turn.

8cdfe07f-5d7d-588a-bea1-d33d3e2dd654.description: The chaos-spawn goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

936f3f9d-4b08-591b-9b0f-1328ae37579f.description: The chaos-spawn goblin makes two attacks with its scimitar.

78df4a17-8b24-54c6-b5dc-f47c7512e1c2.name: Psychic Stab
78df4a17-8b24-54c6-b5dc-f47c7512e1c2.description: The chaos-spawn goblin targets one creature that it can sense within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 12 Intelligence saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

b7b960c1-79cb-50a9-a4d4-7e4f899e3f6f.description: As an action, the child of Yggdrasil destroys one nonmagical object that isn't being worn or carried, such as a rope, plank, candlestick, or even an entire bronze cauldron.

ce2249c8-7dd5-552e-a9e0-ca4868a489ef.name: Forest Camouflage

29cd63bd-37c3-50cd-9d88-0e453f75c043.name: Feybane
29cd63bd-37c3-50cd-9d88-0e453f75c043.description: Creatures of the fey type don't recover spells during a long rest while within 60 feet of the chuhaister. In addition, the chuhaister automatically sees through magical illusions created by spells of 3rd level or lower and has advantage on saving throws and ability checks to detect or see through illusion spells of 4th level or higher.

6b934f3b-ef86-5fec-9458-f5b35a843d17.name: Light Sensitivity (Chuhaister)
6b934f3b-ef86-5fec-9458-f5b35a843d17.description: While in bright light, the chuhaister has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

ed64083f-dc94-5215-90d9-b1a60f2e5956.name: Deadfall Shield
ed64083f-dc94-5215-90d9-b1a60f2e5956.description: When the chuhaister or one ally within 30 feet of it is hit by an attack, the chuhaister can create a magical, wooden barrier that interrupts the attack. The attack causes no damage. The shield splinters and disappears afterwards.

a8413fe0-ebcc-5660-aba1-8a333a7ada25.name: Rock (Chuhaister)
a8413fe0-ebcc-5660-aba1-8a333a7ada25.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 33 (5d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

ddf8d7b2-fe22-5e38-9fbd-5d3b5a8851b9.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Chupacabra)
ddf8d7b2-fe22-5e38-9fbd-5d3b5a8851b9.description: The chupacabra has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: The chupacabra has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

ca3714fb-405f-519d-8741-649112e4ba91.name: Running Leap
ca3714fb-405f-519d-8741-649112e4ba91.description: With a 10-foot running start, the chupacabra can long jump up to 25 feet.

attributes.description: With a 10-foot running start, the chupacabra can long jump up to 25 feet.

a9c06c73-6f61-5e53-acfa-4211712cdffa.name: Bite (Chupacabra)
a9c06c73-6f61-5e53-acfa-4211712cdffa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, and the chupacabra attaches to the target. While attached, the chupacabra doesn't attack. Instead, at the start of each of the chupacabra's turns, the target loses 6 (1d6 + 3) hp due to blood loss. The chupacabra can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. It does so after the target is reduced to 0 hp. A creature, including the target, can use its action to detach the chupacabra.

76ec4cd6-6764-5396-8f9d-98321af95b38.name: Fearful Gaze
76ec4cd6-6764-5396-8f9d-98321af95b38.description: The chupacabra fixes its gaze on one creature it can see within 10 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A paralyzed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the chupacabra's Fearful Gaze for the next 24 hours.

c938d513-8ef9-5868-8e50-2e6ccab5846a.name: Malodorous Stench
c938d513-8ef9-5868-8e50-2e6ccab5846a.description: When the chupacabra is reduced to less than half of its maximum hp, it releases a foul, sulphurous stench. Each creature within 5 feet of the chupacabra must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

693d3c09-0ca7-558e-b669-04a47a18b235.name: Amphibious (Cipactli)
693d3c09-0ca7-558e-b669-04a47a18b235.description: The cipactli can breathe air and water.

73439241-69a9-58a1-ad7a-0f2a55540418.name: Underwater Camouflage
73439241-69a9-58a1-ad7a-0f2a55540418.description: The cipactli has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.

attributes.description: The cipactli has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.

89030487-cbf8-504c-aefe-89c12ea70fdb.name: Water Step
89030487-cbf8-504c-aefe-89c12ea70fdb.description: As a bonus action, the cipactli can liquefy itself, disappearing from its current location and reappearing in an unoccupied space it can see within 20 feet. Its current location and the new location must be connected by water in some way: a stream, ooze, soggy ground, or even runoff from a drain pipe.

ca2e3e2b-78b2-5501-bda9-655a96d25616.name: Ancient Lullaby
ca2e3e2b-78b2-5501-bda9-655a96d25616.description: A cipactli sings a soporific, primordial song of eternal rest and divine repose from its many mouths. Each creature within 100 feet of the cipactli that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or fall asleep and remain unconscious for 10 minutes. A creature awakens if it takes damage or another creature takes an action to wake it. This song has no effect on constructs and undead.

233210a4-559b-5f2b-a698-d65adb9a978d.name: Bite (Cipactli)

c13899d1-a503-569e-8f43-c4ec5426273f.name: Devouring Embrace
c13899d1-a503-569e-8f43-c4ec5426273f.description:
The cipactli devours a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The devoured target is blinded, restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the cipactli, and it takes 14 (4d6) piercing damage at the start of each of the cipactli's turns as the fiend's lesser mouths slowly consume it.

If the cipactli moves, the devoured target moves with it. The cipactli can only devour one target at a time. A creature, including the devoured target, can take its action to pry the devoured target out of the cipactli's many jaws by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength check.

190e3dcf-8f7d-52d9-b4f8-26f341f82e28.description: The cipactli makes two bite attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 14), and the cipactli uses its Devouring Embrace.
