51220f4f-9bb7-59ec-a3f0-4ece8e15fda4.name: Aura of Famine
51220f4f-9bb7-59ec-a3f0-4ece8e15fda4.description: If a creature starts its turn within 10 feet of a gaki, it is overwhelmed by a hunger that dissolves fat and atrophies muscle. It must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw, taking 11 (2d10) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

71ce721b-252c-57a0-a131-5191b81dce14.name: Gluttonous Attraction

Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained, the gargoctopus can automatically hit the target with its tentacle, and it can't use the same tentacle on another target. The gargoctopus can grapple up to four creatures at one time.

A frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

c78f115c-e4ef-586a-aa23-a16ca45dbe2a.name: Blood Frenzy (Giant Shark Bowl)
c78f115c-e4ef-586a-aa23-a16ca45dbe2a.description: The giant shark bowl has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hp.

2c531952-9695-57a6-92b8-9c0d977200fd.name: Electrical Charge
2c531952-9695-57a6-92b8-9c0d977200fd.description: When the giant shark bowl is subjected to lightning damage, it takes no damage and instead becomes charged for 1 minute. While charged, its attacks deal an extra 2 (1d4) lightning damage.

ff57fe39-7250-5a38-bd5a-c71b45c38f35.name: Ooze Fish Bowl
ff57fe39-7250-5a38-bd5a-c71b45c38f35.description: The shark bowl takes up its entire space. Other creatures can enter the space, but they are subjected to the bowl's Engulf and have disadvantage on the saving throw. Creatures inside the bowl can be seen but have total cover. A creature within 5 feet of the bowl can take an action to pull a creature out. Doing so requires a successful DC 15 Strength check, and the creature making the attempt takes 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage. The bowl can hold one Large creature or up to six Medium or smaller creatures inside it at a time.

ca8a833f-7262-57aa-a4b5-499ca83174b2.name: Symbiotically Bound
ca8a833f-7262-57aa-a4b5-499ca83174b2.description: The ooze and the giant shark's life forces have been entwined by an arcane force. They share statistics as if they were one monster and can't be separated.

c92c2b95-2fd3-5eaf-aca1-0a0e256691b3.name: Bite (Giant Shark Bowl)
c92c2b95-2fd3-5eaf-aca1-0a0e256691b3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.

f2a3230d-2d02-594e-97e2-a52c510d5702.name: Engulf (Giant Shark Bowl)
f2a3230d-2d02-594e-97e2-a52c510d5702.description:
The giant shark bowl moves up to its speed. While doing so, it can enter Large or smaller creatures' spaces. Whenever the bowl enters a creature's space, the creature must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. 

On a successful save, the creature can choose to be pushed 5 feet back or to the side of the bowl. A creature that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw. 

On a failed save, the bowl enters the creature's space, and the creature takes 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage and is engulfed. The engulfed creature can't breathe, is restrained, and takes 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage at the start of each of the bowl's turns. When the bowl moves, the engulfed creature moves with it. 

An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 15 Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the bowl.

f12c534f-533f-53ba-b341-6351b964ae41.name: Multiattack (Giant Shark Bowl)

9dfb9481-c044-53d1-afef-607c232f81b0.name: Foul Odor
9dfb9481-c044-53d1-afef-607c232f81b0.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the giant sloth must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll or ability check.

4d3d1e42-2be7-5a42-bcb2-923214d32626.name: Multiattack (Giant Sloth)
4d3d1e42-2be7-5a42-bcb2-923214d32626.description: The giant sloth makes two attacks: one with its claw and one with its bite. If the giant sloth is grappling a creature, it can also use its Sloth's Embrace once.

eb28c84c-2d52-573d-84c3-f80a1e17352e.name: Sloth's Embrace
eb28c84c-2d52-573d-84c3-f80a1e17352e.description: The giant sloth crushes a creature it is grappling by pulling the creature against its fetid, furry chest. The target must make a DC 15 Strength saving throw, taking 27 (6d8) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that fails the save is also stunned until the end of its next turn.

84a27799-5506-5a33-91d3-89e3c4e63701.name: Bite (Giant Vampire Bat)

The bat regains hp equal to the necrotic damage dealt.

ee09c2e7-f63e-5fce-a68a-841215b900fa.description: The glass golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

69bb6aa6-7f84-514d-993d-6df074a976f1.name: Blur
69bb6aa6-7f84-514d-993d-6df074a976f1.description: Creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the gloomflower. An attacker is immune to this effect if it doesn't rely on sight, as with blindsight, or can see through illusions, as with truesight.

190f48ec-4d70-5d6c-ba27-776f29227850.name: Psychic Scream
190f48ec-4d70-5d6c-ba27-776f29227850.description: Whenever the gloomflower takes damage, each creature within 10 feet of the gloomflower must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or take 7 (2d6) psychic damage.

attributes.description: Whenever the gloomflower takes damage, each creature within 10 feet of the gloomflower must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or take 7 (2d6) psychic damage.

b72ba530-47e5-5b15-9acf-d5bc23f09640.name: Corrupting Visions
b72ba530-47e5-5b15-9acf-d5bc23f09640.description:
Each creature of the gloomflower's choice that is within 60 feet of the gloomflower and aware of it must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature is bombarded with visions of its fears and anxieties for 1 minute. While bombarded, it takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage at the start of each of its turns and must spend its action to make one melee attack against a creature within 5 feet of it, other than the gloomflower or itself. If the creature can't make a melee attack, it takes the Dodge action. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. On a success, a creature is incapacitated by hallucinations until the end of its next turn but isn't bombarded with visions of its fears and anxieties. 

A creature that is reduced to 0 hp by this psychic damage falls unconscious and is stable. When that creature regains consciousness, it suffers permanent hallucinations and has disadvantage on ability checks until cured by a remove curse spell or similar magic.

eb4b7e30-ed49-56e6-b7f7-31a9cd95e4dc.name: Expansive
eb4b7e30-ed49-56e6-b7f7-31a9cd95e4dc.description: A creature at least one size smaller than the goliath longlegs can travel through and finish its turn in the goliath longlegs' space.

8fe44983-ea86-523d-be4e-0ebf4f97fd85.name: False Appearance (Goliath Longlegs)
8fe44983-ea86-523d-be4e-0ebf4f97fd85.description: While a goliath longlegs remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from other plants or trees.

26cd3239-90b2-5e3d-9475-c0fa496823e3.name: Forest Camouflage (Goliath Longlegs)
26cd3239-90b2-5e3d-9475-c0fa496823e3.description: The goliath longlegs has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

attributes.description: The goliath longlegs has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

5d51a397-373c-52e6-98ed-f24425b902e0.name: Vulnerable Legs
5d51a397-373c-52e6-98ed-f24425b902e0.description: The goliath longlegs has eight legs. While it has more than four legs, the goliath longlegs is immune to being knocked prone or restrained. Whenever the goliath longlegs takes 20 or more damage in a single turn, one of its legs is destroyed. Each time a leg is destroyed after the fourth one, the goliath longlegs must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or fall prone. Any creature in the goliath longlegs' space or within 5 feet of it when it falls prone must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

b6c73e41-9655-5bb3-9403-e105d59d5780.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

64598e0c-794f-512e-a66a-4245fa599dfe.name: Leg

9d9e6ec4-44eb-59bf-81d4-9b45ae9bc7f4.name: Multiattack (Goliath Longlegs)
9d9e6ec4-44eb-59bf-81d4-9b45ae9bc7f4.description: The goliath longlegs makes one bite attack and then as many leg attacks as it has legs. It can use its Reel in place of two leg attacks.

3a2dc526-592d-5c7a-b766-49b7186ce7bb.name: Paralytic Web
3a2dc526-592d-5c7a-b766-49b7186ce7bb.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: The creature is restrained by webbing and must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the paralyzed effect on itself on a success. As an action, the restrained creature can make a DC 15 Strength check, escaping from the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 12; hp 15; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

995ead18-9d04-5189-a550-f7a56ef7723d.description: The goliath longlegs pulls one creature caught in its web up to 30 feet straight toward it. If the target is within 10 feet of the goliath longlegs, the goliath longlegs can make one bite attack as a bonus action.

5ad33173-c3c0-5e25-9da6-816bd00c2f98.name: Bloodthirsty
5ad33173-c3c0-5e25-9da6-816bd00c2f98.description: If 6 or more gorelings are within 30 feet of one another, they become frenzied and their attacks deal an extra 2 (1d4) necrotic damage.

44563960-0d6f-5aec-9f8c-a27450dea5ce.name: Swarming
44563960-0d6f-5aec-9f8c-a27450dea5ce.description: Up to five gorelings can occupy the same space.

attributes.description: Up to five gorelings can occupy the same space.

43875dc9-e986-5407-9135-eef1e3abd5f2.name: Multiplying
43875dc9-e986-5407-9135-eef1e3abd5f2.description: When a goreling is hit but not reduced to 0 hp, it splits into two new gorelings. Each new goreling has 1 hp, doesn't have this reaction, and is one size smaller than the original goreling.

f5a1d651-295c-5532-bec9-c2ed934e5e75.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) necrotic damage. ++ Reactions

69f07e78-8e33-5bf0-bded-4445fbbb62b2.name: Flesh Wound
69f07e78-8e33-5bf0-bded-4445fbbb62b2.description: At the end of any turn in which the behemoth took at least 30 damage, roll a d8. On a 1, it loses an arm. On a 2, it loses a leg. In addition, 2 (1d4) zombies fall prone in unoccupied spaces within 10 feet of the behemoth, spilling from the wound.

attributes.description: At the end of any turn in which the behemoth took at least 30 damage, roll a d8. On a 1, it loses an arm. On a 2, it loses a leg. In addition, 2 (1d4) zombies fall prone in unoccupied spaces within 10 feet of the behemoth, spilling from the wound.

9bc2334b-eeff-5f23-a744-173cfa31c702.name: Fleshbag
9bc2334b-eeff-5f23-a744-173cfa31c702.description: The behemoth starts with two arms and two legs. If it loses one arm, it can't multiattack. If it loses both arms, it can't slam. If it loses one leg, its speed is halved. If it loses both legs, it falls prone. If it has both arms, it can crawl. With only one arm, it can still crawl, but its speed is halved. With no arms or legs, its speed is 0, and it can't benefit from bonuses to speed.

With no arms or legs, its speed is 0, and it can't benefit from bonuses to speed.

44027d11-817b-559f-a25e-1742579d7e01.name: Turning Defiance (Grave Behemoth)
44027d11-817b-559f-a25e-1742579d7e01.description: The grave behemoth and any zombies within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

attributes.description: The grave behemoth and any zombies within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

4428112e-f389-5432-b2d8-ceffed41d040.name: Zombie Keeper
4428112e-f389-5432-b2d8-ceffed41d040.description: Zombies created by a grave behemoth's Flesh Wound and Hurl Flesh share a telepathic link with it, are under its control, are immune to necrotic damage, and act immediately and on the grave behemoth's initiative.

attributes.description: Zombies created by a grave behemoth's Flesh Wound and Hurl Flesh share a telepathic link with it, are under its control, are immune to necrotic damage, and act immediately and on the grave behemoth's initiative.

89d31456-dff6-54a0-84b3-1e1b7e6e8c3b.name: Gorge
89d31456-dff6-54a0-84b3-1e1b7e6e8c3b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d12 + 6) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d12 + 6) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

0e545241-fe30-5efa-9dc7-16dfbe783806.name: Hurl Flesh
0e545241-fe30-5efa-9dc7-16dfbe783806.description: The grave behemoth vomits putrid flesh and 5 (2d4) zombies in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 38 (11d6) necrotic damage and is covered in rotting slime for 1 minute. On a success, a target takes half the necrotic damage and isn't covered in slime. A creature, including the target, can take an action to clean off the slime. Zombies under the grave behemoth's control have advantage on attack rolls against creatures covered in a grave behemoth's slime.

bd0226ed-5db8-541e-b2a7-84dbf367ca40.name: Multiattack (Grave Behemoth)
bd0226ed-5db8-541e-b2a7-84dbf367ca40.description: The grave behemoth makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The grave behemoth makes two slam attacks.

fa0423e6-3d8f-5456-9a9d-b33a9915e9a9.name: Slam (Grave Behemoth)
fa0423e6-3d8f-5456-9a9d-b33a9915e9a9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

58628d74-3b28-54cc-9a93-e65c54ce9abf.name: Bite (Great Mandrake)
58628d74-3b28-54cc-9a93-e65c54ce9abf.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage.

10875355-bbc5-5174-bb17-df89385d16fd.name: Multiattack (Great Mandrake)
10875355-bbc5-5174-bb17-df89385d16fd.description: A great mandrake makes two attacks with its bite. When its shriek is available, it can use the shriek in place of one bite attack.

attributes.description: A great mandrake makes two attacks with its bite. When its shriek is available, it can use the shriek in place of one bite attack.

9b1f1835-d086-56ad-8760-dda26856fbbd.name: Shriek
9b1f1835-d086-56ad-8760-dda26856fbbd.description: Each creature within 60 feet of the mandrake that can hear it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or take 11 (3d6) thunder damage. If a creature fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is stunned until the end of its next turn. If it fails by 10 or more, it falls unconscious. An unconscious creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, regaining consciousness on a success.

4ded3309-3161-57e1-996f-5bbc16e63e33.name: Innate Spellcasting (Greater Rakshasa)
4ded3309-3161-57e1-996f-5bbc16e63e33.description:
The greater rakshasa's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 18, +10 to hit with spell attacks). The greater rakshasa can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect thoughts, disguise self, mage hand, minor illusion
3/day each: charm person, detect magic, invisibility, major image, suggestion
1/day each: dominate person, fly, plane shift, true seeing

1f733603-a038-5dc4-b883-d4960f04b653.name: Limited Magic Immunity
1f733603-a038-5dc4-b883-d4960f04b653.description: The greater rakshasa can't be affected or detected by spells of 7th level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saving throws against all other spells and magical effects.

attributes.description: The greater rakshasa can't be affected or detected by spells of 7th level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saving throws against all other spells and magical effects.

b7b8a7d2-3fb1-579e-b17f-a7f6b7c121bf.name: Puppet Master
b7b8a7d2-3fb1-579e-b17f-a7f6b7c121bf.description: When the greater rakshasa casts the charm person spell, it can target up to five creatures. When it casts the dominate person spell, the spell's duration is concentration, up to 8 hours.

attributes.description: When the greater rakshasa casts the charm person spell, it can target up to five creatures. When it casts the dominate person spell, the spell's duration is concentration, up to 8 hours.

912fdeb3-6442-5abc-b42c-416991387ef6.name: Cast a Spell
912fdeb3-6442-5abc-b42c-416991387ef6.description: The greater rakshasa casts a spell from its list of innate spells, consuming a use of the spell as normal.

attributes.description: The greater rakshasa casts a spell from its list of innate spells, consuming a use of the spell as normal.

6c213f8d-1e8d-5d94-b407-24d31ca34e6f.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 3 Actions)
6c213f8d-1e8d-5d94-b407-24d31ca34e6f.description: The greater rakshasa casts a spell from its list of innate spells, consuming a use of the spell as normal.

58f9f20e-74de-534c-b05a-1ac78577ce00.name: Claw (Greater Rakshasa)
58f9f20e-74de-534c-b05a-1ac78577ce00.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) slashing damage, and the target is cursed if it is a creature. The magical curse takes effect whenever the target takes a short or long rest, filling the target's thoughts with horrible images and dreams. The cursed target gains no benefit from finishing a short or long rest. The curse lasts until it is lifted by a remove curse spell or similar magic.

cd145049-54dc-5a39-b192-16c5ed2b9bf3.name: Claw Attack
cd145049-54dc-5a39-b192-16c5ed2b9bf3.description: The greater rakshasa makes one claw attack.

attributes.description: The greater rakshasa makes one claw attack.

f6d73a5a-016a-530c-aa32-a670d29b5db9.name: Harrowing Visions
f6d73a5a-016a-530c-aa32-a670d29b5db9.description: The greater rakshasa chooses a point it can see within 60 feet, conjuring a terrifying manifestation of its enemies' worst fears in a 30-foot-radius around the point. Each non-rakshasa in the area must make a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 66 (12d10) psychic damage and becomes frightened for 1 minute. On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

fc3741af-3ba4-5fc7-9091-d9cd92d907c2.name: Misleading Escape
fc3741af-3ba4-5fc7-9091-d9cd92d907c2.description: The greater rakshasa becomes invisible at the same time that an illusory double of itself appears where it is standing. This switch is indiscernible to others. After the double appears, the greater rakshasa can move up to its speed. Both effects last until the start of the greater rakshasa's next turn, but the invisibility ends if the greater rakshasa makes an attack or casts a spell before then.

aac8f5d5-d6c6-55e9-8843-44c48bcb14b7.description: The scrag can breathe air and water.

af80f806-6fed-5359-8629-9b5045c91c98.name: Blood Frenzy (Greater Scrag)
af80f806-6fed-5359-8629-9b5045c91c98.description: The scrag has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all of its hp.

5bae1dd9-c77c-5931-a3c6-ff8f365e8710.name: Regeneration (Greater Scrag)
5bae1dd9-c77c-5931-a3c6-ff8f365e8710.description: The greater scrag regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it is in contact with water. If the scrag takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the scrag's next turn. The scrag dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn't regenerate.

985103d2-47f7-59c0-be69-5427c481fa68.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Green Abyss Orc)
985103d2-47f7-59c0-be69-5427c481fa68.description: While in sunlight, the orc has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. s

78b99589-3206-5200-aae7-2f26749077d7.name: Poisoned Spear
78b99589-3206-5200-aae7-2f26749077d7.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

94006a82-d099-5ee0-84f1-19361cac4072.name: Headsman's Woe
94006a82-d099-5ee0-84f1-19361cac4072.description: If the green knight's head is severed by a vorpal weapon or by other means, magical vines sprout from its neck and the head reattaches by the start of the green knight's next turn, preventing the green knight from dying from the loss of its head.

attributes.description: If the green knight's head is severed by a vorpal weapon or by other means, magical vines sprout from its neck and the head reattaches by the start of the green knight's next turn, preventing the green knight from dying from the loss of its head.

0a5a9fd1-2324-557b-908f-28f266094edc.name: Knight's Challenge (3/Day)
0a5a9fd1-2324-557b-908f-28f266094edc.description:
As a bonus action, the green knight targets one creature that it can see within 30 feet and issues a challenge. If the target can see the green knight, it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or become magically compelled to engage the green knight in melee combat for 1 minute, or until the knight challenges a new opponent. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

On its turn, the affected creature must move towards the green knight and make a melee attack against the green knight.

47a7aaa9-8027-5f6e-92ac-b805630bb4d9.description: The green knight can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.

bfe912fc-dbaf-56d0-900c-c7f8a8dc86b0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands.

b5a57f4f-2ce0-58e5-8816-50e2a532f5dd.description: When the green knight is hit by a melee attack from a creature it has successfully challenged, it can make one battle axe attack with advantage against the attacker.

d89b7970-391e-5cd2-89bc-5dc099a5a245.name: Multiattack (Green Knight of the Woods)
d89b7970-391e-5cd2-89bc-5dc099a5a245.description: The green knight makes two attacks: one with its battle axe and one with its shield bash.

701ffce8-8e65-5dda-88c9-c452dda76718.name: Shield Bash
701ffce8-8e65-5dda-88c9-c452dda76718.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained by magical vines springing forth from the green knight's shield, and the green knight can't make shield bash attacks against other targets.

99a17321-6a60-5b04-a4b2-38dfd44d4a88.name: Mimicry
99a17321-6a60-5b04-a4b2-38dfd44d4a88.description: The grindylow can mimic humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 13 Wisdom (Insight) check.

250b1668-1820-5f53-b3b0-04315631c426.name: Slippery (Grindylow)
250b1668-1820-5f53-b3b0-04315631c426.description: The grindylow has advantage on ability checks and saving throws made to escape a grapple.

a8a9dad8-645c-5269-940d-dff0f161ebc0.name: Water Breathing (Grindylow)
a8a9dad8-645c-5269-940d-dff0f161ebc0.description: The grindylow can breathe only underwater.

attributes.description: The grindylow can breathe only underwater.

48ad5d72-43cd-5493-ab55-4db4b466d9a1.name: Claws (Grindylow)
48ad5d72-43cd-5493-ab55-4db4b466d9a1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d6 + 1) slashing damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the grindylow can't use its claws on another target.

4ac03ac5-e449-54bf-be5a-96eb61ec147d.name: Ink Cloud (Grindylow)
4ac03ac5-e449-54bf-be5a-96eb61ec147d.description:
A 20-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the grindylow if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink.

After releasing the ink, the grindylow can use the Dash action as a bonus action.

efd484cd-9612-589f-9258-d9226d88d7ef.description: If Gugalanna moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a horns attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 22 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, Gugalanna can make one kick attack against it as a bonus action.

e3eac1a7-cdea-5daf-9392-9c0a94259376.name: Multiattack (Gugalanna)
e3eac1a7-cdea-5daf-9392-9c0a94259376.description: Gugalanna makes two attacks: one with its horns and one with its kick.

attributes.description: Gugalanna makes two attacks: one with its horns and one with its kick.

5f8bac29-03b0-54ac-ad5c-a10c955c9406.name: Rearing Stomp
5f8bac29-03b0-54ac-ad5c-a10c955c9406.description: Gugalanna spreads his wings and stomps his hooves, shaking the earth. Each creature within 10 feet of Gugalanna must make a DC 22 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 18 (2d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage and is pushed 20 feet away from Gugalanna. On a success, a target takes half the damage and isn't pushed. Gugalanna can then fly up to half his flying speed.

d7cbe3f7-90f7-5a05-a4a0-ab432a219b42.name: Amorphous (Gulon)
d7cbe3f7-90f7-5a05-a4a0-ab432a219b42.description: The gulon can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing. When it moves through an area smaller than its normal space, it excretes waste in a 5-foot cube. This waste is difficult terrain and creatures crossing through it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute.

fb12c33b-e530-5cf2-af10-c026e24db787.name: Keen Smell (Gulon)

41a6257c-5c22-5cef-b961-7d14551171d0.name: Claw (Gulon)

bbd57c1d-1136-52c9-9c7c-cf282a6a2b60.name: Multiattack (Gulon)

ee6749cb-9b78-5e75-b482-eb26a96a63ce.name: Too Full
ee6749cb-9b78-5e75-b482-eb26a96a63ce.description: The gulon belches a 15-foot-radius cloud of toxic gas around itself. Each creature in the area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 31 (7d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

f56e3ac7-682c-5312-b45f-d4ec55e451eb.name: Shapechanger (Gumienniki)
f56e3ac7-682c-5312-b45f-d4ec55e451eb.description: As a bonus action, the gumienniki can change its form into a Tiny housecat, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form except it loses its flaming hand scythe attack when in cat form.

a34d1e17-9cc0-57cb-bd8a-264741b3e946.name: Through Grass and Sheaves
a34d1e17-9cc0-57cb-bd8a-264741b3e946.description: The gumienniki's speed is doubled when traveling over grassy areas or through planted crops.

b86fee04-e812-54c0-8778-c4eda91cb2e5.description: The gumienniki flashes its glowing eyes, illuminating a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area that can see the gumienniki must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute.

d834f9fb-53b2-5f0b-a6d5-014fffedb506.name: Flaming Hand Scythe

3905ad5d-22bc-5103-8240-4391b6e45e40.name: Taunting Cackle
3905ad5d-22bc-5103-8240-4391b6e45e40.description: When the gumienniki is missed by an attack, it can taunt the attacker. The attacking creature must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll or saving throw.

7079cb1e-0375-5fb8-9ee8-ea224204975e.name: Lash
7079cb1e-0375-5fb8-9ee8-ea224204975e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) slashing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.

c3c07ed0-5e77-5047-ba97-f19db5615ca3.name: Like Calls to Like (Hallowed Reed)
c3c07ed0-5e77-5047-ba97-f19db5615ca3.description: The hallowed reed knows if a creature within 30 feet of it is good-aligned or not.

attributes.description: The hallowed reed knows if a creature within 30 feet of it is good-aligned or not.

158d45d6-2f90-5d3f-bad2-0f328d855d74.name: Limited Telepathy (Hallowed Reed)
158d45d6-2f90-5d3f-bad2-0f328d855d74.description: Using telepathy, a hallowed reed can magically communicate with any other good-aligned creature within 100 feet of it. This communication is primarily through images and emotions rather than actual words.

attributes.description: Using telepathy, a hallowed reed can magically communicate with any other good-aligned creature within 100 feet of it. This communication is primarily through images and emotions rather than actual words.

389192c1-8e47-5b13-90bf-41748128475f.name: Rebirth
389192c1-8e47-5b13-90bf-41748128475f.description: If a hallowed reed is slain, a new patch of hallowed reeds will grow in the same spot starting within a week of its death. Charring or salting the ground where a hallowed reed was slain prevents this resurgence.

attributes.description: If a hallowed reed is slain, a new patch of hallowed reeds will grow in the same spot starting within a week of its death. Charring or salting the ground where a hallowed reed was slain prevents this resurgence.

5071131b-f863-571e-af71-a4d9b4f7ba30.name: Searing Grasp
5071131b-f863-571e-af71-a4d9b4f7ba30.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) radiant damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, it takes 2 (1d4) radiant damage at the start of each of its turns, and the hallowed reed can't grasp another target. Undead and fiends have disadvantage on ability checks made to escape the grapple.

0977f3ca-a68b-5e94-9e3e-7301d53db388.name: Ancestral Spirits
0977f3ca-a68b-5e94-9e3e-7301d53db388.description: Three ghostly spirits haunt the giant. The spirits are incorporeal, remain within 10 feet of the giant at all times, and can't take actions. Each uses the giant's AC and saving throws, has 15 hp and can only be harmed by radiant damage. If an ancestral spirit is reduced to 0 hp, it disappears temporarily. Reduce the giant's AC by 1 and remove one trait granted by the spirits for each spirit that is driven off. Ancestral spirits can't be turned.

bc4bfde4-f230-5e6b-ae9e-2b8d2b1bcfd5.name: Reckless
bc4bfde4-f230-5e6b-ae9e-2b8d2b1bcfd5.description: At the start of its turn, the giant can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

attributes.description: At the start of its turn, the giant can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

8ea8a8c0-95a5-53e8-93d3-2901aa9b0f9d.name: See Invisibility
8ea8a8c0-95a5-53e8-93d3-2901aa9b0f9d.description: The giant can see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible and can see into the Ethereal Plane. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

attributes.description: The giant can see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible and can see into the Ethereal Plane. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

e340632d-4250-5d0f-b660-4dc12f41f468.name: Steadfast
e340632d-4250-5d0f-b660-4dc12f41f468.description: The giant is immune to the charmed and frightened conditions. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

attributes.description: The giant is immune to the charmed and frightened conditions. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

14d84518-bf43-5e41-b883-08e7f96debc0.name: Multiattack (Haunted Giant)
14d84518-bf43-5e41-b883-08e7f96debc0.description: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

attributes.description: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

f53811c6-c088-5d1a-a896-a458053113b7.name: Rock (Haunted Giant)
f53811c6-c088-5d1a-a896-a458053113b7.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

d98fe596-951a-5519-b85e-9cfbd2c0a728.name: Cavalry Charge
d98fe596-951a-5519-b85e-9cfbd2c0a728.description: If the dragonborn moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits with a lance attack on the same turn, it can make a trample attack against that creature as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If the dragonborn moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits with a lance attack on the same turn, it can make a trample attack against that creature as a bonus action.

4086804d-fb23-5388-a9de-5905785e7910.name: Locked Saddle
4086804d-fb23-5388-a9de-5905785e7910.description: The dragonborn can't be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

attributes.description: The dragonborn can't be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

55975164-e3a2-5405-a806-142adf129f3a.name: Mounted Warrior
55975164-e3a2-5405-a806-142adf129f3a.description: The dragonborn is rarely seen without its giant lizard mount. The lizard wears custom scale mail that raises its Armor Class to 15. While the dragonborn is mounted, the giant lizard can't be charmed or frightened.

8670c474-31e8-5e9d-b06b-2d434fff1077.name: Fire Breath (Heavy Cavalry)
8670c474-31e8-5e9d-b06b-2d434fff1077.description: The dragonborn breathes fire in a 15-foot cone. All creatures in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

eebbc4e2-25d8-5551-9958-bc973827e972.name: Heavy Crossbow (Heavy Cavalry)

4e508211-2a57-5c25-8b68-41d65e904902.name: Trample
4e508211-2a57-5c25-8b68-41d65e904902.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

9bac45b9-57eb-5ba2-9d4f-4cd1beedda0e.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Hierophant Lich)
9bac45b9-57eb-5ba2-9d4f-4cd1beedda0e.description: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

1c3a3d03-385d-5171-adb9-535f5cd8b990.name: Levitate
1c3a3d03-385d-5171-adb9-535f5cd8b990.description: As a bonus action, a hierophant lich can rise or descend vertically up to 20 feet and can remain suspended there. This trait works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the lich doesn't need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, a hierophant lich can rise or descend vertically up to 20 feet and can remain suspended there. This trait works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the lich doesn't need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

a1df002d-2688-5223-8e22-4e5e6b88e157.name: Rejuvenation
a1df002d-2688-5223-8e22-4e5e6b88e157.description: If it has a sacred vessel, a destroyed hierophant lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the vessel.

attributes.description: If it has a sacred vessel, a destroyed hierophant lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the vessel.

8cf3659a-c27a-5131-a20f-5d8378b45d8a.name: Spellcasting (Hierophant Lich)
8cf3659a-c27a-5131-a20f-5d8378b45d8a.description:
The lich is an 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The lich has the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): guidance, mending, sacred flame, thaumaturgy
- **1st Level** (4 slots): command, detect magic, protection from evil and good, sanctuary
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, silence
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): animate dead, dispel magic, spirit guardians
- **4th Level** (3 slots): banishment, freedom of movement, guardian of faith
- **5th Level** (1 slot): flame strike

c08616b2-681a-5243-a1f8-1804fb54a515.name: Turn Resistance
c08616b2-681a-5243-a1f8-1804fb54a515.description: The hierophant lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

attributes.description: The hierophant lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

cdb7adee-acbe-58fc-b7c2-1e2d038062b6.name: Cantrip
cdb7adee-acbe-58fc-b7c2-1e2d038062b6.description: The hierophant lich casts a cantrip.

a48a902f-bcfc-5574-8d7f-41fed43674bf.name: Damnation
a48a902f-bcfc-5574-8d7f-41fed43674bf.description: The hierophant lich threatens one creature within 10 feet of it with eternal suffering. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the hierophant lich's Damnation for the next 24 hours.

a0ecb49a-1d01-59c6-ad6b-eb5c512bf3e7.name: Unholy Smite

a8c829a8-8a30-5f1d-8ee7-ae1913cbed03.description: The heirophant lich uses its Unholy Smite.

41822d90-54db-5004-9940-56ff1ce2a083.name: Amphibious (Horned Serpent)
41822d90-54db-5004-9940-56ff1ce2a083.description: The horned serpent can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The horned serpent can breathe air and water.

b9c16c8d-88f7-5443-9313-bb0351dd0b1e.name: Corpse Cough
b9c16c8d-88f7-5443-9313-bb0351dd0b1e.description: Those who fail a saving throw against the horned serpent's Gem Gaze or bite attack become infected with the corpse cough disease. The infected creature can't benefit from short or long rests due to a constant, wet cough. The infected creature must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw each day or take 18 (4d8) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. The reduction lasts until the target is cured of the disease with a greater restoration spell or similar magic. If the infected creature comes into physical contact with a blood relative before the disease is cured, the relative must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or also become infected with the disease. The blood relative is afflicted with a constant, wet cough within hours of infection, but the disease's full effects don't manifest until 1d4 days later. Corpse cough is so named due to the smell of the cough as the infected creature's lungs become necrotic.

515ef85c-03ac-58e2-b5b2-8acdb65d1ddb.description: At the start of each of the horned serpent's turns, each creature within 20 feet of it must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

e4b14839-3cd5-5d5e-ada0-3989b3457fce.name: Shielded Mind
e4b14839-3cd5-5d5e-ada0-3989b3457fce.description: The horned serpent is immune to scrying and to any effect that would sense its emotions, read its thoughts, or detect its location.

50637ee8-ecaf-5b7c-b67c-8d0a77a4a959.name: Bite (Horned Serpent)

7a31ce6d-a75b-511b-b32f-3f41c844ae66.name: Gem Gaze
7a31ce6d-a75b-511b-b32f-3f41c844ae66.description: The horned serpent's gem flashes, bathing a 30-foot cone in iridescent light. Each creature in the area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 35 (10d6) radiant damage and is infected with the corpse cough disease (see the Corpse Cough trait). On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't infected with the disease. Gem Gaze has no effect on constructs and undead.

d188cb83-058d-530d-9526-4bc1bd5fdb2a.name: Entrance by Corners
d188cb83-058d-530d-9526-4bc1bd5fdb2a.description: The hound of Tindalos may only enter the Material Plane at a sharp intersection of surfaces. As a bonus action, the hound can teleport from one location to another within sight of the first, provided it travels from one sharp corner to another.

9f3745d9-1bf9-5a53-8098-b7d6251bab45.description: If the hound of Tindalos moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the hound of Tindalos can make one tongue attack against it as a bonus action.

1169e3ed-2209-5f21-9929-e5de6b826aee.name: Hunter of the Lost
1169e3ed-2209-5f21-9929-e5de6b826aee.description: The hound can transport itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the hound can only affect itself, not other creatures, and can't use it to banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

b4c00b4d-2aea-55e6-b209-2c310e8b2c26.name: Tongue

The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

d1cd17a7-7529-535f-b08d-c67ec4baeeff.description: If the ichneumon is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the ichneumon instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

234c6b7d-540e-5fba-8b61-7a6f128193a0.description: If the ichneumon spends an hour applying mud to itself, it can increase its AC by 2 for 8 hours.

1b026f2e-d1b9-5c06-b4e9-4543e261f347.name: Bite (Ichneumon)

86a14b6e-2946-515b-9914-3d4cfff65e7d.description: The ijiraq's weapon attacks are magical.

37a6c71d-a257-5c5a-a1be-6c5fd3650307.name: Memory Loss
37a6c71d-a257-5c5a-a1be-6c5fd3650307.description: After encountering an ijiraq, a creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw to remember the events. On a failure, the details of the encounter rapidly fade away from the creature's mind, including the presence of the ijiraq.

965cd3ee-4d65-5b04-bcda-c6ed73b71605.name: Change Shape (Ijiraq)
965cd3ee-4d65-5b04-bcda-c6ed73b71605.description:
The ijiraq magically polymorphs into any beast that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, into its caribou-human hybrid form, or back into its true from. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (the ijiraq's choice). 

While in its true form or its hybrid form, its statistics are the same. When in a beast form, the ijiraq retains its alignment, hp, Hit Dice, ability to speak, proficiencies, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, as well as this action. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.

b28d38b6-2772-505a-9b8b-a357718770e5.name: Claw (Ijiraq)
b28d38b6-2772-505a-9b8b-a357718770e5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) poison damage. Invisibility (True Form Only). The ijiraq magically turns invisible until it attacks, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). It may choose whether equipment it wears or carries is invisible with it or not.

85d1d2be-7019-5def-8686-3c2abeebfe37.description: In its true form, the ijiraq makes two claw attacks. In its hybrid form, it makes one gore attack and one claw attack.

792f1769-7277-5398-ba63-139c5a06a7ce.name: Magma Form
792f1769-7277-5398-ba63-139c5a06a7ce.description: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. A creature that touches the elemental or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage and must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or the weapon becomes stuck in the elemental. If the weapon's wielder can't or won't let go of the weapon, the wielder is grappled while the weapon is stuck. While stuck, the weapon can't be used. Until the grapple ends, the wielder takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. To end the grapple, the wielder can release the weapon or pull it free by taking an action to make a DC 16 Strength check and succeeding.

54d64724-b7fe-55ed-8d20-beb3ff203712.name: Multiattack (Incinis)
54d64724-b7fe-55ed-8d20-beb3ff203712.description: The incinis makes two magma fist attacks.

965d0b9d-2bbf-578d-9074-7dedeca19038.name: Wave of Magma
965d0b9d-2bbf-578d-9074-7dedeca19038.description: The incinis transforms into a wave of magma, moving up to its speed in a straight line. Each creature in the path where the incinis moves must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 21 (6d6) fire damage and, if it is a Large or smaller creature, it is pushed ahead of the incinis and knocked prone in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of where the incinis ends its movement. On a success, a target takes half the damage and is neither pushed nor knocked prone.

9a12de72-1e7c-538d-9841-363e84ab3cf6.name: Faultless Tracker
9a12de72-1e7c-538d-9841-363e84ab3cf6.description: If the infernal knight is given a quarry by its lord, the knight knows the direction and distance to its quarry as long as the two of them are on the same plane of existence.

84ce47f7-4999-5e0a-b5da-34f5a4d56239.description: The infernal knight regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp.

A creature hit by the sword must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or suffer disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks based on Strength or Dexterity until the end of its next turn.

02c345da-58a2-5436-aaaa-8eb5108e9095.name: Hellfire Bolt
02c345da-58a2-5436-aaaa-8eb5108e9095.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) fire damage plus 17 (5d6) necrotic damage. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

b910180f-17f8-5461-ab00-bdff36c26216.name: Multiattack (Infernal Knight)
b910180f-17f8-5461-ab00-bdff36c26216.description: The infernal knight makes two melee attacks or uses its Hellfire Bolt twice. It can replace one attack with Reave Soul.

attributes.description: The infernal knight makes two melee attacks or uses its Hellfire Bolt twice. It can replace one attack with Reave Soul.

0d857697-845c-5892-a2d0-f35962c81a0f.name: Planar Rift
0d857697-845c-5892-a2d0-f35962c81a0f.description: The infernal knight magically tears a rift in the fabric of the multiverse. The rift is a portal to a plane of the infernal knight's choice. The portal remains open for 1 hour, during which time any creature can pass through it, moving from one plane to the other. A dispel magic spell targeting the rift can destroy it if the caster succeeds on a DC 18 spellcasting ability check.

The portal remains open for 1 hour, during which time any creature can pass through it, moving from one plane to the other. A dispel magic spell targeting the rift can destroy it if the caster succeeds on a DC 18 spellcasting ability check.

4370483a-e53a-5f2d-b1c8-e67920cfb959.name: Reave Soul
4370483a-e53a-5f2d-b1c8-e67920cfb959.description:
The infernal knight targets a creature with 0 hp that it can see within 60 feet of it. If the creature is alive, it must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or die and have its soul drawn into the infernal knight's greatsword. If the creature is dead and has been dead for less than 1 minute, its soul is automatically captured. When the infernal knight captures a soul, it regains 30 hp, and Reave Soul recharges at the start of its next turn. While a creature's soul is trapped, that creature can't be returned to life by any means short of a wish spell.

A banishment spell targeted at the greatsword forces the infernal knight to make a Charisma saving throw against the spell. On a failed save, any souls trapped in the blade are released instead of the spell's normal effect. Trapped souls are also released when the infernal knight dies.

240842e1-0acf-519d-802c-e7a965f3ab36.description: The ink guardian can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

40d9b2fd-2382-59e5-8b65-2aa551208d18.name: Bottled Rejuvenation
40d9b2fd-2382-59e5-8b65-2aa551208d18.description:
When activated, the creature launches from its bottle, landing within 20 feet of the bottle. It starts as Tiny, and at the start of each of its turns, it increases in size by one step to a maximum of Large.

When the ink guardian is defeated, the bottle becomes inactive for 3d8 hours. After that time, the ink guardian regains all its hp and is active again. The bottle has AC of 20, 10 hp, and is immune to damage that isn't bludgeoning. If the bottle is destroyed, the ink guardian dies and can't rejuvenate.

328d4607-b0be-5155-ae98-4fd37a3029bd.description: A creature that touches the ink guardian or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage. The ink guardian can eat through flesh quickly, but it doesn't harm metal, wood, or paper.

198390d0-c2d2-545f-b10d-33ba8d771e13.name: Volatile
198390d0-c2d2-545f-b10d-33ba8d771e13.description: When the ink guardian is subjected to thunder damage, it takes no damage and instead splashes onto creatures within 5 feet of it. Each creature in the area takes 4 (1d8) acid damage. When the ink guardian is reduced to 0 hp, it explodes. Each creature within 15 feet of it must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

1068f66a-12b6-553c-b239-f70d6622dc8b.name: Pseudopod (Ink Guardian)
1068f66a-12b6-553c-b239-f70d6622dc8b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) acid damage.

8bb7d18a-7149-50e4-a035-fc2109dd4ffe.name: A Thirst for Knowledge
8bb7d18a-7149-50e4-a035-fc2109dd4ffe.description: If an inkling spends 24 hours with a spellbook or a spell scroll, it can learn the magic of one 2nd level or lower spell, erasing and absorbing all the ink and magic used to inscribe the spell. The inkling can then cast the spell once per day.

630e677c-0cf9-594c-8139-3da4c3b62466.name: Amorphous (Inkling)
630e677c-0cf9-594c-8139-3da4c3b62466.description: The inkling can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

cf4b5725-671b-57b0-8586-87ab94d9b302.name: Innate Spellcasting (Inkling)
cf4b5725-671b-57b0-8586-87ab94d9b302.description:
The inkling's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring only somatic components:
At will: fire bolt, mending, minor illusion, prestidigitation
1/day each: color spray, detect magic, magic missile

a144fb96-097c-50c8-8fd5-4b11be17c4ec.name: Magic Resistance (Inkling)
a144fb96-097c-50c8-8fd5-4b11be17c4ec.description: The inkling has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The inkling has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

514d791c-816d-5721-bd7a-21c25fd7355f.name: Redirect Spell
514d791c-816d-5721-bd7a-21c25fd7355f.description: If a spell attack hits the inkling, it can force the attacker to make a DC 12 Intelligence saving throw. If the attacker fails the saving throw, the spell is redirected to hit another creature of the inkling's choice within 30 feet.

attributes.description: If a spell attack hits the inkling, it can force the attacker to make a DC 12 Intelligence saving throw. If the attacker fails the saving throw, the spell is redirected to hit another creature of the inkling's choice within 30 feet.

174a7f4b-ef3d-519a-b2bd-d75ae9a308b2.name: Immutable Form (Iron Sphere)
174a7f4b-ef3d-519a-b2bd-d75ae9a308b2.description: The sphere is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The sphere is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

0bbb000e-8fd3-5edd-bf11-0e5c861da11f.name: Siege Monster (Iron Sphere)
0bbb000e-8fd3-5edd-bf11-0e5c861da11f.description: The sphere deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The sphere deals double damage to objects and structures.

346f6eb9-25d5-5907-9ae5-28dd3ec875d6.name: Standing Leap (Iron Sphere)
346f6eb9-25d5-5907-9ae5-28dd3ec875d6.description: The sphere can launch itself into the air by extending the rods within it like pistons. The sphere's long jump is up to 25 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

attributes.description: The sphere can launch itself into the air by extending the rods within it like pistons. The sphere's long jump is up to 25 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

3d8e8d14-bc0b-5c36-9688-66d19c37c9f4.name: Tunneler
3d8e8d14-bc0b-5c36-9688-66d19c37c9f4.description: The sphere can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 5-foot-wide, 5-foot-high tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: The sphere can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 5-foot-wide, 5-foot-high tunnel in its wake.

752b20d3-c56a-5339-bf85-b90fe167d4a6.name: Blade
752b20d3-c56a-5339-bf85-b90fe167d4a6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

89d78337-8836-5f48-a4b7-7e0cd362e03b.name: Lightning Cannon
89d78337-8836-5f48-a4b7-7e0cd362e03b.description: The sphere extends a metal rod from one of its many facets and fires a bolt of lightning in a 20-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

b3dfe1fb-1854-5f0c-b42c-9e05559b2571.name: Multiattack (Iron Sphere)
b3dfe1fb-1854-5f0c-b42c-9e05559b2571.description: The iron sphere makes three melee attacks.

1e67c131-e466-5b56-89b8-43338dc32a5d.name: Piston
1e67c131-e466-5b56-89b8-43338dc32a5d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

3f53121f-cd10-50b9-b1a9-d34820cfe926.name: Amphibious (Jaanavar Jal)
3f53121f-cd10-50b9-b1a9-d34820cfe926.description: The jaanavar jal can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The jaanavar jal can breathe air and water.

a8473d01-b02c-58a1-82d8-4b059a3ea048.name: Regeneration (Jaanavar Jal)
a8473d01-b02c-58a1-82d8-4b059a3ea048.description: The jaanavar jal regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp. If the jaanavar jal takes cold damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The jaanavar jal dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn't regenerate.

677c5ea5-97af-5b6d-9065-211c0dd67a7e.name: Bite (Jaanavar Jal)
677c5ea5-97af-5b6d-9065-211c0dd67a7e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) piercing damage

7e07e70b-f852-567e-8930-e6061a349948.name: Constrict
7e07e70b-f852-567e-8930-e6061a349948.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained and the jaanavar jal can't constrict another creature.

2ff01e9b-95a3-5b8e-8b48-bc7bf2201d54.name: Flaming Oil Spittle
2ff01e9b-95a3-5b8e-8b48-bc7bf2201d54.description: The jaanavar jal expels a line of burning oil that is 40 feet long and 5 feet wide from glands beside its mouth. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 31 (9d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

0fa58d2e-9e55-584b-8bc0-268b089b13a4.name: Multiattack (Jaanavar Jal)
0fa58d2e-9e55-584b-8bc0-268b089b13a4.description: The jaanavar jal makes two attacks: one with its bite and one to constrict.

a6cec12a-c4b4-5465-9d59-ce4fece33080.name: Blind Senses
a6cec12a-c4b4-5465-9d59-ce4fece33080.description: The jiangshi can't use its blindsight while deafened.

attributes.description: The jiangshi can't use its blindsight while deafened.

a3c409fb-1181-5bb0-99e6-fc7285428ade.name: Keen Hearing (Jiangshi)
a3c409fb-1181-5bb0-99e6-fc7285428ade.description: The jiangshi has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

attributes.description: The jiangshi has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

7af94ff8-998b-525c-bb10-dd271132b54b.name: Prayer of Magic Resistance
7af94ff8-998b-525c-bb10-dd271132b54b.description: The jiangshi has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects. A creature can take its action while within 5 feet of the jiangshi to rip the prayer off the jiangshi by succeeding on a DC 16 Strength check. The jiangshi loses this trait if its prayer scroll is removed.

67962755-163a-5fd8-8eae-b6623674ba88.name: Standing Leap (Jiangshi)
67962755-163a-5fd8-8eae-b6623674ba88.description: The jiangshi's long jump is up to 30 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

attributes.description: The jiangshi's long jump is up to 30 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

a476725d-a924-5c5f-9461-9be3f333a1de.name: Terrifying Appearance
a476725d-a924-5c5f-9461-9be3f333a1de.description: When a creature that can see the jiangshi starts its turn within 30 feet of the jiangshi, it must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw, unless the jiangshi is incapacitated. On a failed save, the creature is frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the jiangshi's Terrifying Appearance for the next 24 hours.

99a2773f-4575-5e70-b656-b6b9616ec5fc.name: Claw (Jiangshi)
99a2773f-4575-5e70-b656-b6b9616ec5fc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Medium or smaller creature and the jiangshi doesn't have two other creatures grappled.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Medium or smaller creature and the jiangshi doesn't have two other creatures grappled.

2854dfe0-3d23-5248-aae7-1eed89f899c1.name: Life Drain (Jiangshi)
2854dfe0-3d23-5248-aae7-1eed89f899c1.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature that is grappled by the jiangshi, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 14 (4d6) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. 

A humanoid slain in this way rises 24 hours later as a jiangshi, unless the humanoid is restored to life, its body is bathed in vinegar before burial, or its body is destroyed.

3703804b-1171-5d45-ae10-ec9801564d1c.name: Multiattack (Jiangshi)
3703804b-1171-5d45-ae10-ec9801564d1c.description: The jiangshi makes two claw attacks. It can use Life Drain in place of one claw attack.

5baae785-6c2a-5626-b53e-cef83e98f8a9.name: Burrowing Roots
5baae785-6c2a-5626-b53e-cef83e98f8a9.description: Whenever the jinmenju makes a root attack, it can choose a point on the ground within 120 feet of it. The root bursts from the ground, and that point becomes the attack's point of origin. After attacking, the exposed root protrudes from that point, and the jinmenju gains a reaction each turn that it can only use to make an opportunity attack with that root. A root has AC 15, 45 hp, and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. Damaging a root doesn't damage the jinmenju tree. The jinmenju can have up to 5 roots active at one time. If it makes a root attack while it has 5 roots active, one of the active roots burrows back into the ground and a new root appears at the location of the new attack.

3195ac5d-1aa2-5d73-9385-eb312f8025f1.name: Laughing Fruit
3195ac5d-1aa2-5d73-9385-eb312f8025f1.description: If a creature with Intelligence 5 or higher eats a bite of the fruit of the jinmenju, it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or fall prone, becoming incapacitated by fits of laughter as it perceives everything as hilariously funny for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target takes damage while prone, it has advantage on the saving throw.

44b5a1b6-c37f-584b-b6c7-12cb143b8999.name: Mirthful Miasma
44b5a1b6-c37f-584b-b6c7-12cb143b8999.description: The jinmenju emits a puff of purple gas around its roots. Each creature within 10 feet of an exposed root must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or fall prone with laughter, becoming incapacitated and unable to stand up until the end of its next turn. A creature in an area of overlapping gas only makes the saving throw once. A creature with an Intelligence score of 4 or less isn't affected.

446f4a24-1424-5901-a995-53e0e0cfbb72.name: Multiattack (Jinmenju)

a5fbec2e-9af7-5121-9a2b-d3e99530144b.name: Root
a5fbec2e-9af7-5121-9a2b-d3e99530144b.description: The jimenju makes one root attack.

attributes.description: The jimenju makes one root attack.

ad9d6db6-16c7-57ba-a07c-861927890b7e.name: Animate Objects (1/Day)
ad9d6db6-16c7-57ba-a07c-861927890b7e.description: The kobold casts animate objects without any components. Wisdom is its spellcasting ability.

attributes.description: The kobold casts animate objects without any components. Wisdom is its spellcasting ability.

d397fdc0-a28a-53f6-868a-8f7ab153f0d2.name: Junk Armor
d397fdc0-a28a-53f6-868a-8f7ab153f0d2.description: As a bonus action, the kobold can create magical armor out of scrap metal and bits of junk it touches. The armor provides AC 13 + Dexterity modifier, and a critical hit scored against the kobold becomes a normal hit instead. The armor lasts until the kobold uses a bonus action to end it, the armor is removed from the kobold, or the kobold dies.

700bd086-51cd-563a-88f1-71096b85b339.name: Pack Tactics (Junk Shaman)
700bd086-51cd-563a-88f1-71096b85b339.description: The kobold has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

8f4ce4c1-f11e-505a-b0e6-3223200b9aa3.name: Flame Jet
8f4ce4c1-f11e-505a-b0e6-3223200b9aa3.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the target is a creature or flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

79db0fb0-de0c-5a32-8b34-f2da625ceff4.name: Fey Ancestry (Kallikantzaros)
79db0fb0-de0c-5a32-8b34-f2da625ceff4.description: The kallikantzaros has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put a kallikantzaros to sleep.

attributes.description: The kallikantzaros has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put a kallikantzaros to sleep.

267d2468-d5a5-5eaa-9a48-417de0e2153f.name: Hateful Scents
267d2468-d5a5-5eaa-9a48-417de0e2153f.description: A kallikantzaros who begins its turn within 20 feet of burning incense must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of its next turn. The kallikantzaros can't voluntarily move toward the incense. Burning old shoes has the same effect.

ba060e23-3b7d-5a48-86b8-81af17a74b61.name: Nimble Escape (Kallikantzaros)
ba060e23-3b7d-5a48-86b8-81af17a74b61.description: The kallikantzaros can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

9b12716c-898d-5d46-a0fa-2e72a2ca084b.name: Handsaw
9b12716c-898d-5d46-a0fa-2e72a2ca084b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage. The handsaw does an extra die of damage against a target that is wearing no armor.

a63ddd1d-4547-595a-8469-6a13f5554a52.name: Misery Whip
a63ddd1d-4547-595a-8469-6a13f5554a52.description: Two kallikantzaros can combine their actions to move up to their speed with a 5-foot, two-person saw held between them and attack a single creature in their path. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 9 (2d6 + 2) slashing damage. If the creature is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is knocked prone, each kallikantzaros may make a handsaw attack against it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The kallikantzaros makes two handsaw attacks or two spear attacks.

4db77fe0-7272-57c2-be47-69a5e90aa989.name: Spear (Kallikantzaros)
4db77fe0-7272-57c2-be47-69a5e90aa989.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

4f6cc70e-af86-5708-9dd0-992fe5ef4e8e.name: Nimble Feet
4f6cc70e-af86-5708-9dd0-992fe5ef4e8e.description: The kapi can take the Disengage action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

attributes.description: The kapi can take the Disengage action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

0ddb28b2-39f3-52c6-a360-0f72a10566b1.name: Prehensile Tail
0ddb28b2-39f3-52c6-a360-0f72a10566b1.description: The kapi can use its tail to pick up or hold a small object that isn't being worn or carried. It can use its tail to interact with objects, leaving its hands free to wield weapons or carry heavier objects. The kapi can't use its tail to wield a weapon but can use it to trip an opponent (see below).

04e03d90-7f69-5961-804d-010e483de2dc.name: Multiattack (Kapi)
04e03d90-7f69-5961-804d-010e483de2dc.description: The kapi makes two attacks: one with its quarterstaff and one with its tail trip.

attributes.description: The kapi makes two attacks: one with its quarterstaff and one with its tail trip.

d398e26b-19c3-5d83-b28e-15a87b1d13ee.name: Quarterstaff
d398e26b-19c3-5d83-b28e-15a87b1d13ee.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage or 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage or 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

5630f3f4-031c-5900-bcfa-ff6106fe5314.name: Sling (Kapi)
5630f3f4-031c-5900-bcfa-ff6106fe5314.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

46da2bcb-0a4b-51dd-aa06-0292457a0f41.name: Tail Trip
46da2bcb-0a4b-51dd-aa06-0292457a0f41.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: The target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: The target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.

070b368f-f02f-5eb9-92b8-d727157b73a6.name: Amphibious (Kappa)
070b368f-f02f-5eb9-92b8-d727157b73a6.description: The kappa can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The kappa can breathe air and water.

caad6077-ff4f-567d-ba54-d5737f3346f6.name: Expert Wrestler
caad6077-ff4f-567d-ba54-d5737f3346f6.description: The kappa can grapple creatures that are two sizes larger than itself and can move at full speed when dragging a creature it has grappled.

attributes.description: The kappa can grapple creatures that are two sizes larger than itself and can move at full speed when dragging a creature it has grappled.

11961819-f368-5167-b8ba-1d07826c2483.name: Head Bowl
11961819-f368-5167-b8ba-1d07826c2483.description:
The kappa has a bowl-like indentation on its head which holds water from the river or lake where it lives. If the kappa's head bowl is empty, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the bowl is refilled with water. 

Normal movement and combat do not cause water to spill from the bowl, but an opponent can empty the bowl by knocking the kappa prone or by making two successful grapple attacks - one to grab the kappa, and one to tip its head while it is grappled.

59b88688-dcdd-59b4-bf64-5da142fdc133.name: Slippery (Kappa)
59b88688-dcdd-59b4-bf64-5da142fdc133.description: The kappa has advantage on ability checks and saving throws made to escape a grapple.

attributes.description: The kappa has advantage on ability checks and saving throws made to escape a grapple.

a034bbec-bee9-5c97-91e5-2bad664e56a1.name: Sure-Footed
a034bbec-bee9-5c97-91e5-2bad664e56a1.description: The kappa has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

attributes.description: The kappa has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

6134433f-20ef-5ebe-811b-3a25926252b1.name: Claw (Kappa)
6134433f-20ef-5ebe-811b-3a25926252b1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the kappa doesn't already have another creature grappled.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the kappa doesn't already have another creature grappled.

39390b9d-3f42-55b0-8f1d-a86022793a0c.name: Multiattack (Kappa)
39390b9d-3f42-55b0-8f1d-a86022793a0c.description: The kappa makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The kappa makes two claw attacks.

f5d09cec-05a5-5c7a-9fce-a5d2ae6df17e.name: Night Walkers
f5d09cec-05a5-5c7a-9fce-a5d2ae6df17e.description: The karakura can only exist on the Material Plane at night or underground. Spells or effects that count as sunlight cast the fiend back to the Plane of Shadow for 1d4 hours.

attributes.description: The karakura can only exist on the Material Plane at night or underground. Spells or effects that count as sunlight cast the fiend back to the Plane of Shadow for 1d4 hours.

dec63866-f167-53ce-9621-8d6cc3f0094a.name: Shapechanger (Karakura)
dec63866-f167-53ce-9621-8d6cc3f0094a.description: The karakura can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, or back into its true form. Other than its size, its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

attributes.description: The karakura can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, or back into its true form. Other than its size, its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

d2a39a20-6104-55cd-a375-8a81556632bc.name: Telepathic Bond
d2a39a20-6104-55cd-a375-8a81556632bc.description: The karakura can telepathically communicate with any creature it has charmed at any distance and across different planes.

attributes.description: The karakura can telepathically communicate with any creature it has charmed at any distance and across different planes.

5c8e8370-2da0-5c86-ab21-eb20455cce18.name: Charm
5c8e8370-2da0-5c86-ab21-eb20455cce18.description:
One humanoid the karakura can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed until dawn. The charmed target obeys the fiend's commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw to end the effect. If the target successfully saves, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to this karakura's Charm for the next 24 hours. 

The karakura can have only one target charmed at a time. If it charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.

If the target successfully saves, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to this karakura's Charm for the next 24 hours.

1beddc6b-aef4-5787-98f5-20c4319fe316.name: Multiattack (Karakura)
1beddc6b-aef4-5787-98f5-20c4319fe316.description: The karakura makes three claw attacks and can use Charm or Shroud in Darkness, if it is available.

attributes.description: The karakura makes three claw attacks and can use Charm or Shroud in Darkness, if it is available.

f8842d91-7ae7-5a81-9089-5d2726a7680c.name: Shadow Walk
f8842d91-7ae7-5a81-9089-5d2726a7680c.description: The karakura can magically enter the Plane of Shadow from the Material Plane, or vice versa.

attributes.description: The karakura can magically enter the Plane of Shadow from the Material Plane, or vice versa.

8eebc434-31f9-59e3-b166-6a0534ed9adc.name: Shroud in Darkness
8eebc434-31f9-59e3-b166-6a0534ed9adc.description:
Bands of shadow stretch out from the karakura and wrap around a target it can see within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be translocated to the Plane of Shadow for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. When a target exits the shroud, it appears in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of the karakura. 

The karakura can have only one target in its shroud at a time. It can release a target as a bonus action. 

While in the Plane of Shadow, the target is bombarded with horrific images and sensations. Each round it remains in the Plane of Shadow, it must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or gain one short-term madness. A target held in the shroud is released when the karakura dies.

1d70c424-f485-5d64-a42b-b5f0a61a4953.name: Empty Keg
1d70c424-f485-5d64-a42b-b5f0a61a4953.description: A keg golem holds 20 gallons of ale. If it runs out of ale or empties itself from ale blast, the golem's speed is reduced to 0 and it has disadvantage on all attack rolls until it is refilled with at least 1 gallon of ale.

attributes.description: A keg golem holds 20 gallons of ale. If it runs out of ale or empties itself from ale blast, the golem's speed is reduced to 0 and it has disadvantage on all attack rolls until it is refilled with at least 1 gallon of ale.

d8242711-338a-5cc5-bba8-865ce525e159.name: Immutable Form (Keg Golem)
d8242711-338a-5cc5-bba8-865ce525e159.description: The keg golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The keg golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

4da74a3a-2551-577d-a773-778d53d30f90.name: Magic Resistance (Keg Golem)
4da74a3a-2551-577d-a773-778d53d30f90.description: The keg golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The keg golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

912b0ea9-735d-5b5b-8bc6-b1573f9bb7ce.name: Rolling Charge
912b0ea9-735d-5b5b-8bc6-b1573f9bb7ce.description: If the keg golem moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a slam attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the keg golem can make one slam attack against it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If the keg golem moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a slam attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the keg golem can make one slam attack against it as a bonus action.

1194d359-ed47-5dfd-9073-2fac794354d8.name: Ale Blast
1194d359-ed47-5dfd-9073-2fac794354d8.description: The keg golem shoots a 1 gallon jet of ale in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 9 (2d8) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a target takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
