1fe3b19d-80aa-5d34-ba8b-24a9a0d9afe0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage and the creature is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the snake can't constrict another target.

d9319843-2ab3-5b64-acd2-81adc414d446.name: Bound (Three-Headed Clockwork Dragon)
d9319843-2ab3-5b64-acd2-81adc414d446.description:
The dragon is magically bound to three circlets. As long as the dragon is within 1 mile of a circlet wearer on the same plane of existence, the wearer can communicate telepathically with the dragon. While the dragon is active, the wearers see through its eyes and hear what it hears. During this time, the wearers are deaf and blind with regard to their own senses. 

If only two circlet wearers are within 1 mile of the active dragon each hour spent wearing the circlets imposes one level of exhaustion on those wearers. If only a single wearer is within 1 mile of the active dragon, each minute spent wearing the circlet gives that wearer one level of exhaustion. If no circlet wearers are within 1 mile of the dragon, it views all creatures it can see as enemies and tries to destroy them until a circlet wearer communicates with the dragon or the dragon is destroyed. A circlet wearer can use its action to put the dragon in an inactive state where it becomes incapacitated until a wearer uses an action to switch the dragon to active. 

Each circlet is a magic item that must be attuned.

eca2d362-7ff6-5330-b1a8-a4c57ac99c19.name: Pheromones
eca2d362-7ff6-5330-b1a8-a4c57ac99c19.description: The jeweled drone emits a sweet scent that empowers other tosculi within 15 feet of the drone. A tosculi that starts its turn within the area can add a d6 to one attack roll or saving throw it makes before the start of its next turn, provided it can smell the scent. A tosculi can benefit from only one Pheromones die at a time. This effect ends if the jeweled drone dies.

attributes.description: The jeweled drone emits a sweet scent that empowers other tosculi within 15 feet of the drone. A tosculi that starts its turn within the area can add a d6 to one attack roll or saving throw it makes before the start of its next turn, provided it can smell the scent. A tosculi can benefit from only one Pheromones die at a time. This effect ends if the jeweled drone dies.

1b6fdd1f-bd92-5126-a8f5-ff96e78ae867.name: Scintillating Carapace
1b6fdd1f-bd92-5126-a8f5-ff96e78ae867.description:
While in bright light, the jeweled drone's carapace shines and glitters. When a non-tosculi creature that can see the drone starts its turn within 30 feet of the drone, the drone can force the creature to make a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw if the drone isn't incapacitated. On a failure, the creature is blinded until the start of its next turn.

Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If it does so, it can't see the drone until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If it looks at the drone in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

18bc6b8e-8e62-5a33-afa3-586fec72baf3.description: The jeweled drone makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its scimitar.

6bf881cc-e015-5411-a621-2accae9fc574.name: Protect the Queen
6bf881cc-e015-5411-a621-2accae9fc574.description: When a creature makes an attack against a tosculi hive queen, the jeweled drone grants a +2 bonus to the queen's AC if the drone is within 5 feet of the queen.

1ffaec71-b866-5efd-ba37-290051f4b0ae.name: Scimitar (Tosculi Jeweled Drone)
1ffaec71-b866-5efd-ba37-290051f4b0ae.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

4e8b9eaf-4d7c-5b64-8f0e-eba0289fb2fb.name: Regeneration (Trollkin Shaman)
4e8b9eaf-4d7c-5b64-8f0e-eba0289fb2fb.description: The trollkin shaman regains 5 hp at the start of its turn. If the shaman takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the shaman's next turn. The shaman dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn't regenerate.

8d9911f6-881d-5863-950e-e20a10f84356.name: Spellcasting (Trollkin Shaman)
8d9911f6-881d-5863-950e-e20a10f84356.description:
The trollkin shaman is an 8th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It has the following druid spells prepared: 

- **Cantrips** (at will): druidcraft, produce flame, shillelagh
- **1st Level** (4 slots): cure wounds, entangle, faerie fire, thunderwave
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): flaming sphere, hold person
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): dispel magic, meld into stone, sleet storm
- **4th Level** (2 slots): dominate beast, grasping vine

fd2d17cf-017f-578e-bc82-62efed233e68.description: The trollkin shaman's skin is thick and tough, granting it a +1 bonus to Armor Class. This bonus is already factored into the trollkin's AC.

840f39f7-7cbc-58bf-b373-f857fc6b205f.description: The trollkin shaman inspires ferocity in up to three trollkin it can see. Those trollkin have advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the end of the shaman's next turn and gain 10 temporary hp.

6bedb0b7-d68d-5a84-bbed-7a648a195134.name: Spear (Trollking Grunt)

d68c0a03-d89c-56fc-9570-71f643162fe9.name: Incorporeal Movement (Tulpa)
d68c0a03-d89c-56fc-9570-71f643162fe9.description: The tulpa can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

67e17517-6937-5059-8364-86f4124d4ffd.name: It Follows
67e17517-6937-5059-8364-86f4124d4ffd.description: The tulpa always remains within 500 feet if its creator. As long as the tulpa is within 500 feet of its creator, the creator has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws.

attributes.description: The tulpa always remains within 500 feet if its creator. As long as the tulpa is within 500 feet of its creator, the creator has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws.

4e084b64-21db-56ee-8e8e-575665af758e.name: Rise Again
4e084b64-21db-56ee-8e8e-575665af758e.description: Within a day of being slain, the tulpa reforms within 500 feet of its creator. It doesn't reform if its creator is slain, or if the creator's mental disturbance is healed. The tulpa is immune to all damage dealt to it by its creator.

00f895cf-e477-595c-b5dc-32c385bf2b9b.name: Black Claw
00f895cf-e477-595c-b5dc-32c385bf2b9b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) necrotic damage.

0b26bda3-ac99-5fb3-a944-90704e6938fd.name: Imposing Dread
0b26bda3-ac99-5fb3-a944-90704e6938fd.description: The tulpa uses its action to fill a 40-foot radius around itself with dread-inducing psychic energy. Each creature, other than the tulpa's creator, within that area must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of the tulpa until the end of its next turn and become cursed. A creature with an Intelligence of 5 or lower can't be cursed. While cursed by the tulpa, that creature's own thoughts turn ever more dark and brooding. Its sense of hope fades, and shadows seem overly large and ominous. The cursed creature can repeat the saving throw whenever it finishes a long rest, ending the effect on itself on a success. If not cured within three days, the cursed creature manifests its own tulpa.

8a26e215-7081-554e-a52c-10efa9c1e022.name: Psychic Blast

b62fa813-c32a-5478-addb-fa9666238f7b.name: Blood Frenzy (Tusked Crimson Ogre)
b62fa813-c32a-5478-addb-fa9666238f7b.description: The ogre has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hp.

attributes.description: The ogre has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hp.

588efb34-2387-57e7-96c3-24d4ea994d35.name: Rampage (Tusked Crimson Ogre)
588efb34-2387-57e7-96c3-24d4ea994d35.description: When the ogre reduces a creature to 0 hp with a melee attack on its turn, the ogre can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make one bite attack.

attributes.description: When the ogre reduces a creature to 0 hp with a melee attack on its turn, the ogre can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make one bite attack.

d979d692-013a-5913-b6dc-f450eb66c499.name: Berserker's Blood
d979d692-013a-5913-b6dc-f450eb66c499.description: If the tusked crimson ogre doesn't have all of its hp, it flexes and roars, spraying blood from its wounds. Each creature within 15 feet of the ogre must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) acid damage and goes berserk. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't go berserk. On each of its turns, a berserk creature must attack the nearest creature it can see, eschewing ranged or magical attacks in favor of melee attacks. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the berserk creature attacks an object, with preference for an object smaller than itself. Once a creature goes berserk, it continues to do so until it is unconscious, regains all of its hp, or is cured through lesser restoration or similar magic.

57ebd0a0-440e-5daf-bb27-8330b4bc0203.name: Battle Frenzy
57ebd0a0-440e-5daf-bb27-8330b4bc0203.description: Once reduced to 30 hp or less, the tveirherjar makes all attacks with advantage.

attributes.description: Once reduced to 30 hp or less, the tveirherjar makes all attacks with advantage.

6d44285f-5fb0-507c-99f2-2ae9c1a2623d.name: Curse of the Tveirherjar (Recharge 6)
6d44285f-5fb0-507c-99f2-2ae9c1a2623d.description: As a bonus action, the tveirherjar forces a creature it hit with its Niflheim longsword this round to make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. The creature takes 36 (8d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If an einherjar is reduced to 0 hp by this effect, it dies, cursed to become a tveirherjar at sundown.

b7847750-eb6a-51c2-838c-4bc13206aeb6.name: Niflheim Longsword
b7847750-eb6a-51c2-838c-4bc13206aeb6.description: The tveirherjar's longsword absorbs light within 30 feet of it, changing bright light to dim light and dim light to darkness. When the tveirherjar dies, its longsword crumbles away, its magic returning to the creator for the next tveirherjar.

a8108fc3-94d2-548d-be86-a194a191714c.name: Unerring Tracker
a8108fc3-94d2-548d-be86-a194a191714c.description: The tveirherjar can locate any einherjar within 1,000 feet. This trait works like the locate creature spell, except running water doesn't block it.

9618bd34-1e37-5555-811f-b63ad25076d6.name: Spear of the Northern Sky

This light works like the faerie fire spell, except only the tveirherjar has advantage on attacks against the creature and the light is not absorbed by the tveirherjar's Niflheim longsword.

The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the two-headed eagle can't use its talons on another target.

52a44b0e-cded-5425-83cc-741962986085.name: Bilious Aura
52a44b0e-cded-5425-83cc-741962986085.description: A living creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the undead phoenix can't regain hp and has disadvantage on Constitution saving throws until the start of its next turn.

1b4c88fe-60ad-5558-ad28-29ce56cbc545.description: If it dies, the undead phoenix reverts into a pile of necrotic-tainted ooze and is reborn in 24 hours with all of its hp. Only killing it with radiant damage prevents this trait from functioning.

5b267865-440f-538e-894a-7a5ce610943d.name: Decaying Bite

The cursed target can't regain hp until the curse is lifted by the remove curse spell or similar magic.

7033f7e4-3b9e-5cf9-87ba-e25273613846.description: The undead phoenix makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its decaying bite.

attributes.description: The undead phoenix makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its decaying bite.

16ae4474-6feb-5e11-b632-e0c4ac40ba71.name: Hatred
16ae4474-6feb-5e11-b632-e0c4ac40ba71.description: Deprived of parental bonds, the unhatched despise those who nurture and heal others. The unhatched has advantage on attacks against a creature whose most recent action was to heal, restore, strengthen, or otherwise aid another creature.

attributes.description: Deprived of parental bonds, the unhatched despise those who nurture and heal others. The unhatched has advantage on attacks against a creature whose most recent action was to heal, restore, strengthen, or otherwise aid another creature.

b53e195b-92bf-5c65-87c2-eba81e65cad6.description:
The unhatched‘s innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring only verbal components:
At will: chill touch, minor illusion
1/day: bane

6f82290e-e61e-57ae-ad7d-db8ebbd22eb9.name: Bite (Unhatched)

5742ad6b-7d36-5b38-9137-80132a83919c.name: Desiccating Breath
5742ad6b-7d36-5b38-9137-80132a83919c.description: The dragon exhales a cloud of choking dust infused with necrotic magic in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature who fails this save can't speak until the end of its next turn as it chokes on the dust.

ae53ca7e-e21d-5ca2-9ed1-219cb66ad01d.description: The ursa polaris has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

96d4ee32-d6cb-560b-b0ce-70458143544f.name: Bite (Ursa Polaris)
96d4ee32-d6cb-560b-b0ce-70458143544f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) cold damage.

12cae7d0-db23-5a81-823f-457b7b2a94d5.name: Cold Breath
12cae7d0-db23-5a81-823f-457b7b2a94d5.description: The ursa polaris exhales a blast of freezing wind and shards of ice in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage and 14 (4d6) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The ursa polaris exhales a blast of freezing wind and shards of ice in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage and 14 (4d6) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

45fe21c1-d474-5565-ba8b-072216e8be47.name: Hypnotic Array
45fe21c1-d474-5565-ba8b-072216e8be47.description: The ursa polaris sways its back, causing the ice formations on its shoulders to catch available light. Each creature within 30 feet of the ursa polaris that sees the light pattern must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) radiant damage and is stunned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned. A stunned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The effect also ends if the creature takes any damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it out of its stupor.

4db5ac82-3a59-551b-b7a9-5975bea3f8e5.name: Multiattack (Ursa Polaris)

1a92ad65-06d0-5107-8c07-6ba811f4483d.name: Cruel Combatant
1a92ad65-06d0-5107-8c07-6ba811f4483d.description: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage and an extra 3 (1d6) necrotic damage when the vampire patrician hits with it (included in the attack).

aaef0da4-af3a-50b5-8ac4-12db87698837.name: Misty Escape
aaef0da4-af3a-50b5-8ac4-12db87698837.description:
When it drops to 0 hp outside its resting place, the vampire patrician transforms into a cloud of mist instead of falling unconscious, provided that it isn't in sunlight or running water. If it can't transform, it is destroyed. While it has 0 hp in mist form, it can't revert to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. 

While in mist form it can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless, has a flying speed of 20 feet, can hover, and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, if air can pass through a space, the mist can do so without squeezing, and it can't pass through water. It has advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws, and it is immune to all nonmagical damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight. 

Once in its resting place, it reverts to vampire form. It is then paralyzed until it regains at least 1 hp. After spending 1 hour in its resting place with 0 hp, it regains 1 hp.

f78a29e9-abac-5236-80e2-05ef3e7df35e.name: Noble Resilience (Recharges after a Long Rest)
f78a29e9-abac-5236-80e2-05ef3e7df35e.description: The vampire patrician can ignore the effects of sunlight for up to 1 minute.

attributes.description: The vampire patrician can ignore the effects of sunlight for up to 1 minute.

227a588b-bb62-5385-a47a-69dcb73abfd9.name: Regeneration (Vampire Patrician)
227a588b-bb62-5385-a47a-69dcb73abfd9.description: The patrician regains 15 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp and isn't in sunlight or running water. If it takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn.

03737641-4426-5246-9ae4-5bd990b58052.name: Spider Climb (Vampire Patrician)
03737641-4426-5246-9ae4-5bd990b58052.description: The vampire patrician can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The vampire patrician can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

bf02ee19-fe4a-57c3-8c0b-163e8e785e09.name: Vampire Weaknesses (Vampire Patrician)
bf02ee19-fe4a-57c3-8c0b-163e8e785e09.description:
The vampire patrician has the following flaws:
Forbiddance. The patrician can't enter a residence without an invitation from one of the occupants.
Harmed by Running Water. The patrician takes 20 acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.
Stake to the Heart. If a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into the patrician's heart while the patrician is incapacitated in its resting place, the patrician is paralyzed until the stake is removed.
Sunlight Hypersensitivity. The patrician takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

b67f1944-2d53-5ac8-95af-1fde999920b7.name: Bite (Vampire Patrician)
b67f1944-2d53-5ac8-95af-1fde999920b7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the vampire patrician, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the patrician regains hp equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. A humanoid slain in this way and then buried in the ground rises the following night as a vampire spawn under the vampire patrician's control.

530b78c9-74f4-5c7f-8cfb-bac413382fe8.name: Rapier (Vampire Patrician)
530b78c9-74f4-5c7f-8cfb-bac413382fe8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) necrotic damage.

f350d154-b8d1-5373-9e38-2dd6a7ef09b9.name: Release the Hounds!
f350d154-b8d1-5373-9e38-2dd6a7ef09b9.description: The vampire patrician calls 4d6 hunting hounds (use mastiff statistics) to its side. While outdoors, the vampire patrician can call 4d6 hunting raptors (use blood hawk statistics) instead. These creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, helping the patrician and obeying its spoken commands. The beasts remain for 1 hour, until the patrician dies, or until the patrician dismisses them as a bonus action.

71813145-b995-5cf9-b10f-1b70c2899ec2.name: Misty Escape (Vampire Priestess)
71813145-b995-5cf9-b10f-1b70c2899ec2.description:

0bf1ea23-be02-5d1d-9e44-df1b47199d44.name: Spellcasting (Vampire Priestess)
0bf1ea23-be02-5d1d-9e44-df1b47199d44.description:
The vampire priestess is a 9th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). She has the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): light, guidance, poison spray, thaumaturgy
- **1st Level** (4 slots): bane, command, inflict wounds, ray of sickness
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): blindness/deafness, silence, spiritual weapon
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): bestow curse, dispel magic, spirit guardians
- **4th Level** (3 slots): banishment, freedom of movement
- **5th Level** (1 slot): contagion, flame strike

Sunlight Hypersensitivity. The priestess takes 20 radiant damage when she starts her turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, she has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

5ab9fb0f-104d-566d-8d23-9102249b00c7.name: Bewitching Gaze
5ab9fb0f-104d-566d-8d23-9102249b00c7.description: The vampire priestess targets one humanoid she can see within 30 feet. If the target can see her, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by the priestess for 1 minute. While charmed, the creature is incapacitated and has a speed of 0. Each time the vampire priestess or her allies do anything harmful to the target, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. The target can also repeat the saving throw if another creature uses an action to shake the target out of its stupor.

d5e67e58-bddc-526a-b00b-2bc5ab131d82.name: Scourge
d5e67e58-bddc-526a-b00b-2bc5ab131d82.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. A bleeding creature takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

f0fd1a38-f5c9-5427-b1e7-62d6b6dbfffd.description: Each living creature within 20 feet of the vampiric knight must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: Each living creature within 20 feet of the vampiric knight must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

cb93ad76-9b13-54aa-9f55-d8a487cf15e0.name: Impaling Longsword
cb93ad76-9b13-54aa-9f55-d8a487cf15e0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) slashing damage, or 10 (1d10 + 5) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage. The vampiric knight impales the target on its longsword, grappling the target if it is a Medium or smaller creature (escape DC 17). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained, takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns, and the vampiric knight can't make longsword attacks against other targets.

4490ddd7-90f6-59c6-9b47-5ff5e53eaec6.description: When a creature makes an attack against an allied vampire, the knight can grant the vampire a +3 bonus to its AC if the knight is within 5 feet of the vampire.

f75b5bb4-9638-5c7e-8362-a890debff42d.name: Distract
f75b5bb4-9638-5c7e-8362-a890debff42d.description: As a bonus action, the vanara can use its tail to distract an opponent within 5 feet of it by pulling on an arm, tossing dirt in the target's face, or some other method of interfering. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or have disadvantage on all attacks against the vanara until the vanara's next turn.

e79bc30b-27ef-550d-a5b4-99f25b343132.name: Quadrupedal Dash
e79bc30b-27ef-550d-a5b4-99f25b343132.description: As a bonus action, the vanara can move up to 80 feet without provoking opportunity attacks. It can't use this trait if it is wielding a weapon or holding an object weighing more than 10 lbs.

1192476e-e5f3-5a0a-b3e4-602cf4d1c86b.name: Howl (Vanara)
1192476e-e5f3-5a0a-b3e4-602cf4d1c86b.description: The vanara releases a sonorous howl in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 18 (4d8) thunder damage and is deafened for 1 minute. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't deafened.

Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion. If an infected creature succeeds on the saving throw, it no longer gains exhaustion levels each day. A second successful save at the end of a long rest cures the disease. The abyssal disease resists many efforts at treatment and can only be cured by a greater restoration spell or similar magic. A living creature that dies from the effects of carrion curse has a 75% chance of rising again as a blood zombie (see page 393) within 24 hours.

94ddcb3e-77e4-5861-ac1a-11e4fa5897bb.description: The venom maw hydra can breathe air and water.

2d50e054-298c-5bf0-a268-aa62be84c934.name: Multiple Heads (Venom Maw Hydra)
2d50e054-298c-5bf0-a268-aa62be84c934.description: The venom maw hydra has five heads. While it has more than one head, the venom maw hydra has advantage on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious. Whenever the hydra takes 25 or more damage in a single turn, one of its heads dies. If all its heads die, the hydra dies. At the end of its turn, it grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken cold damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 10 hp for each head regrown in this way.

The separated vines can't attack while in this state, but they can reform into the vines of Nemthyr as a bonus action.

e99e0463-2850-5a9f-9053-6d6a903aa11f.name: Spellcasting (Void Giant)
e99e0463-2850-5a9f-9053-6d6a903aa11f.description:
The void giant is an 11th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). The void giant has the following wizard spells prepared: 

- **Cantrips** (at will): chill touch, light, mending, shocking grasp
- **1st Level** (4 slots): comprehend languages, magic missile, shield
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): crown of madness, mirror image, scorching ray
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): counterspell, fly, lightning bolt
- **4th Level** (3 slots): confusion, ice storm, phantasmal killer
- **5th Level** (2 slots): cone of cold, dominate person
- **6th Level** (1 slot): disintegrate

3304850c-488e-561e-92c2-efff90813757.description: As a bonus action, the void giant can infuse a spell with void magic. One creature that is hit by that spell or who fails a saving throw against that spell is stunned until the end of the creature's next turn.

78cdacae-805d-56eb-911c-e2ab4923b581.name: Magic Absorption
78cdacae-805d-56eb-911c-e2ab4923b581.description: If the void giant succeeds on a saving throw against an enemy spell, the void giant doesn't suffer the effects of that spell. If it uses Void Casting on its next turn, the void giant can affect all creatures hit by its spell or who fail a saving throw against its spell instead of just one creature.

9ebb8f6a-9a5a-5abd-838c-e465ee0bf9ab.description: The dragon blasts warped arcane energy in a 20-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

32943e05-add1-5eca-9b42-426bfdc13b26.name: Amphibious (Water Horse)

705cdb8a-41ee-5db2-8a70-e93c00751443.name: Shapechanger (Water Horse)
705cdb8a-41ee-5db2-8a70-e93c00751443.description: The water horse can use its action to polymorph into a Medium humanoid, a horse, or its true horse-humanoid hybrid form. Its statistics, other than its size, speed, and AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

5098df47-dfb8-5ace-95d8-66f346e86553.name: Charming Gaze
5098df47-dfb8-5ace-95d8-66f346e86553.description: The water horse targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Charisma saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed, the target is incapacitated and can only move toward the water horse. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The target has advantage on the saving throw if it has taken damage since the end of its last turn. If the target successfully saves or if the effect ends for it, the target is immune to this water horse's Charming Gaze for the next 24 hours.

8860b9cf-9c69-5c90-bef7-65c150e18d63.name: Antimagic Susceptibility (Weirding Scroll)
8860b9cf-9c69-5c90-bef7-65c150e18d63.description: The weirding scroll is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the weirding scroll must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

97419177-8acf-5595-962a-ae79805071c7.name: False Appearance (Weirding Scroll)
97419177-8acf-5595-962a-ae79805071c7.description: While the weirding scroll remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal scroll.

5de95d15-d509-58b3-93be-355a09fc25cf.name: Dominate
5de95d15-d509-58b3-93be-355a09fc25cf.description: A weirding scroll beguiles one humanoid that it can see within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 hour. The charmed creature obeys the telepathic commands of the weirding scroll to the best of its ability. This action works like the dominate person spell, except the weirding scroll doesn't need to concentrate to maintain the domination, and it can't take total and precise control of the target. The weirding scroll can have only one humanoid under its control at one time. If it dominates another, the effect on the previous target ends.

097c3b56-0e40-5fa2-ac70-cea132a37533.name: Aura of Starvation
097c3b56-0e40-5fa2-ac70-cea132a37533.description: A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the wendigo must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed by gnawing cold and crippling hunger for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the wendigo's Aura of Starvation for the next 24 hours.

80798e37-02c4-5cbd-b616-9752765d6c8c.description: The whisperer is a highly advanced being that often carries pieces of powerful wands of fireballs shaped like staves with peculiar triggers, eyes of the eagle shaped as a pair of cylinders, or a helm of telepathy in the form of a glowing metal disc adhered to the side of the creature's head.

96cdcfa9-4f00-5d6e-b56d-d8fb807e9ee4.name: Innate Spellcasting (Whisperer in Darkness)
96cdcfa9-4f00-5d6e-b56d-d8fb807e9ee4.description:
The whisperer's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 20). The whisperer can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: alter self, detect magic, detect thoughts, disguise self, fear, identify, invisibility (self only), misty step, sleep, suggestion
3/day each: confusion, dimension door, disintegrate, dream, modify memory, plane shift, teleport
1/day each: feeblemind, meteor swarm, mind blank, weird

74a42054-182d-584a-b70f-b27abe279283.name: Beloved by the Gods
74a42054-182d-584a-b70f-b27abe279283.description: When the white stag dies, the deity that created it curses the creature that dealt the killing blow. The cursed creature finds the natural world working against it: roots randomly rise up to trip the creature when it walks past a tree (5% chance per mile traveled in forested terrain), animals are more reluctant to obey (disadvantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks), and the wind seems to always be blowing in the least favorable direction for the creature (scattering papers, sending the creature's scent in the direction of a creature tracking it, etc.). This curse lasts until it is lifted by a remove curse spell or after the cursed creature completes a task of penance for the deity or its temple.

4908fabf-7e7d-5202-9a2b-addd64171f3d.name: Running Leap (White Stag)
4908fabf-7e7d-5202-9a2b-addd64171f3d.description: With a 10-foot running start, the white stag can long jump up to 25 feet.

attributes.description: With a 10-foot running start, the white stag can long jump up to 25 feet.

30eff734-49d4-580a-82f7-77e0e34ff60a.name: Hooves (White Stag)
30eff734-49d4-580a-82f7-77e0e34ff60a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

7824ce3f-c5c8-56be-a4d1-bf2e13df5d2b.name: Multiattack (White Stag)
7824ce3f-c5c8-56be-a4d1-bf2e13df5d2b.description: The white stag makes one gore attack and one hooves attack.

attributes.description: The white stag makes one gore attack and one hooves attack.

8756adbd-af15-5c50-9f5a-5ad5687043aa.name: Berserk (Wickerman)
8756adbd-af15-5c50-9f5a-5ad5687043aa.description: If the staff controlling the wickerman is broken or is not being worn or carried by a humanoid, the wickerman goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the wickerman attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the wickerman attacks an object with preference for an object smaller than itself. Once the wickerman goes berserk, it continues to do so until it is destroyed, until a new staff is created, or until the staff is worn or carried by a humanoid.

On each of its turns while berserk, the wickerman attacks the nearest creature it can see. Once the wickerman goes berserk, it continues to do so until it is destroyed, until a new staff is created, or until the staff is worn or carried by a humanoid.

faabc1e0-7d1c-5462-bec8-89cb150e71e8.name: Blazing Fury
faabc1e0-7d1c-5462-bec8-89cb150e71e8.description: A creature that touches the wickerman or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. If the wickerman's flame is ever doused, it is incapacitated until the flame is rekindled by dealing at least 10 fire damage to it.

e6676318-297b-5aa4-aed2-cfbd2b8db7cf.name: Water Susceptibility (Wickerman)
e6676318-297b-5aa4-aed2-cfbd2b8db7cf.description: If the wickerman is on fire, it takes 1 cold damage for every 5 feet it moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it. If the wickerman takes at least 100 points of cold damage within a 1 minute period, its flame is doused.

attributes.description: If the wickerman is on fire, it takes 1 cold damage for every 5 feet it moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it. If the wickerman takes at least 100 points of cold damage within a 1 minute period, its flame is doused.

1186592d-3492-5f6c-ad4a-14750db8e2d3.name: Blazing Ray
1186592d-3492-5f6c-ad4a-14750db8e2d3.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d10) fire damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d10) fire damage.

0bd3b189-383f-5189-853a-d5056765dba8.name: Imprison
0bd3b189-383f-5189-853a-d5056765dba8.description: The wickerman makes one slam attack against a target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is imprisoned inside its burning body, and the grapple ends. A creature imprisoned in the wickerman is blinded, restrained, has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the wickerman, and it takes 17 (5d6) fire damage at the start of each of the wickerman's turns. Up to 6 Medium or smaller creatures can fit inside a wickerman's body. If the wickerman takes 25 damage or more from a creature inside of it, the wickerman must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or the creature bursts free from it. The creature falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the wickerman. If the wickerman dies, all creatures inside of it are no longer restrained by it and can escape from the burning corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

13cb852e-4d0c-5fcb-9b7c-97c5078fb520.name: Multiattack (Wickerman)
13cb852e-4d0c-5fcb-9b7c-97c5078fb520.description: The wickerman makes two slam attacks.

53e4517b-30a1-530e-be57-3fcee7f762b2.name: Slam (Wickerman)
53e4517b-30a1-530e-be57-3fcee7f762b2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (1d10) fire damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 16). The wickerman has two fists, each of which can grapple only one target.

c61dde29-0e63-56b5-be3e-82dea2bd0044.name: Arrow Bane
c61dde29-0e63-56b5-be3e-82dea2bd0044.description: When the wind demon is targeted by an attack or spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll a d6. On a 1 to 5, the attacker has disadvantage on the attack roll. On a 6, the wind demon is unaffected, and the attack is reflected back at the attacker as though it originated from the wind demon, turning the attacker into the target.

d71641b0-0d5b-5e00-ac04-776060902752.name: Magic Resistance (Wind Demon)
d71641b0-0d5b-5e00-ac04-776060902752.description: The wind demon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

5f2c25c6-52bf-5207-9781-42620e35b0a6.name: Frost Claw
5f2c25c6-52bf-5207-9781-42620e35b0a6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) cold damage.

f6184b36-cefa-53a1-95a5-8a43f2402927.name: Multiattack (Wind Demon)
f6184b36-cefa-53a1-95a5-8a43f2402927.description: The wind demon makes two frost claw attacks.

attributes.description: The wind demon makes two frost claw attacks.

5aa34753-e4d0-5536-b556-a4585e81bbf0.name: Swift as Frost
5aa34753-e4d0-5536-b556-a4585e81bbf0.description: After a creature the wind demon can see damages it with an attack, the wind demon can move up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: After a creature the wind demon can see damages it with an attack, the wind demon can move up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

8a8be4ea-5692-5d15-aa0a-91d1abe87eb4.name: Aura of Silence
8a8be4ea-5692-5d15-aa0a-91d1abe87eb4.description: A creature within 120 feet of the wind eater has disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing. All creatures within 20 feet of the wind eater are immune to thunder damage and are deafened. This trait works like the silence spell, except the effect moves with the wind eater and persists unless it is incapacitated or until it dies.

80c44c55-7560-5ad5-a5b3-dfc23c08f010.name: Incorporeal Movement (Wind Eater)
80c44c55-7560-5ad5-a5b3-dfc23c08f010.description: The wind eater can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

2915e2a7-ca26-5480-9165-f5d8732885a0.name: Innate Spellcasting (Wind Eater)
2915e2a7-ca26-5480-9165-f5d8732885a0.description:
The wind eater's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring only somatic components:
At will: silent image
3/day each: blur, major image
1/day: mirage arcane

0b2c72d7-b1ed-5743-b297-5eeefc2c7f23.name: Shadow Blend
0b2c72d7-b1ed-5743-b297-5eeefc2c7f23.description: As a bonus action while in dim light or darkness, the wind eater becomes invisible. The invisibility lasts until the wind eater uses a bonus action to end it or until the wind eater attacks, is in bright light, or is incapacitated. Any equipment the wind eater wears or carries is invisible with it.

3da8db16-260f-5022-9a2c-10d2cd0701f9.name: Multiattack (Wind Eater)
3da8db16-260f-5022-9a2c-10d2cd0701f9.description: The wind eater makes two claw attacks.

b4d17966-fd54-5c33-a7a6-1e9344697b5d.name: Air Form (Whirlwind Form Only)
b4d17966-fd54-5c33-a7a6-1e9344697b5d.description: The wind weasel can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

a983560a-bfc9-534e-b48c-b98b45f220bb.name: Flyby (Whirlwind Form Only)
a983560a-bfc9-534e-b48c-b98b45f220bb.description: The wind weasel doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

7b054fa6-2495-5762-a4b6-0726bee9da51.name: Hidden In The Wind (Whirlwind Form Only)
7b054fa6-2495-5762-a4b6-0726bee9da51.description: Until it attacks or uses Whirling Leaves, the wind weasel is indistinguishable from a natural dust devil unless a creature succeeds on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check.

attributes.description: Until it attacks or uses Whirling Leaves, the wind weasel is indistinguishable from a natural dust devil unless a creature succeeds on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check.

5ffb9c2b-fd4c-561c-ad7a-0c89028bf94b.name: Shapechanger (Wind Weasel)
5ffb9c2b-fd4c-561c-ad7a-0c89028bf94b.description: The wind weasel can use its action to polymorph into a whirlwind. It can revert back to its true form as a bonus action. It statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies. While a whirlwind, it has a flying speed of 60 feet, immunity to the grappled, petrified, restrained, and prone conditions, and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. The wind weasel can't make bite or claw attacks while in whirlwind form.

a620e7c7-03a5-5194-a35a-08654159f4b8.name: Windy Speed (Whirlwind Form Only)
a620e7c7-03a5-5194-a35a-08654159f4b8.description: When the wind weasel is subjected to the slow spell, it doesn't suffer the effects of the spell but instead is forced into its true form and incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

c49fc9b4-645a-5300-898f-25b03e866626.name: Whirling Leaves
c49fc9b4-645a-5300-898f-25b03e866626.description: Each creature in the wind weasel's space must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

fd46fcfb-5bfb-59fd-87a3-ffbd77a8793e.name: Strong Winds
fd46fcfb-5bfb-59fd-87a3-ffbd77a8793e.description: The wind's harp devil has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its allies is an air elemental, wind demon, or similar creature of air, is within 20 feet of the target, and isn't incapacitated. rP

69d2dbba-bf5d-5740-a557-9583e6b27f29.description: When a spell is cast within 60 feet of it, the wind's harp devil plays a single, infernal note, interrupting the spell. This reaction works like the counterspell spell, except it only works on spells of 3rd level or lower.

e4658c2b-82cb-5b66-9b61-1e119335a672.name: Hellish Chorus
e4658c2b-82cb-5b66-9b61-1e119335a672.description: The wind's harp devil creates an infernal cacophony. Each creature within 30 feet of it must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 13 (3d8) psychic damage and 7 (2d6) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Devils are immune to the hellish chorus.

6346807f-7642-5a90-a3d1-2109b3f89734.description: While the wirbeln remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

ee17ff92-6d49-58f1-9084-39df31f16285.name: Poison Dart
ee17ff92-6d49-58f1-9084-39df31f16285.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

fbea8a6b-4cb1-5dad-b857-2868422f0ac1.name: Spore Cloud
fbea8a6b-4cb1-5dad-b857-2868422f0ac1.description: (Recharge 5-6). The wirbeln ejects spores in a 15foot cone. All creatures that are not wirbeln fungi must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or take 5 (1d10) poison damage and be subject to one of the following effects for 1 minute, depending on the wirbeln's color: green is poisoned; red is blinded; yellow is incapacitated; blue is paralyzed; purple is frightened; and black is 5 (2d4) poison damage each round. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

c4c03347-8853-5847-a64d-8940c3d07f8a.description: As a bonus action, a target of the witch queen's choice within 60 feet of her has disadvantage on its saving throw against her next spell.

1d21a0ca-9de8-51ac-8c8f-12474eaa2c39.name: Magic Resistance (Witch Queen)
1d21a0ca-9de8-51ac-8c8f-12474eaa2c39.description: The witch queen has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

ee75c2e3-62a6-5332-b083-a11b3fb05f00.name: Spellcasting (Witch Queen)
ee75c2e3-62a6-5332-b083-a11b3fb05f00.description:
The witch queen is an 8th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). She has the following wizard spells prepared: 

- **Cantrips** (at will): acid splash, mage hand, message, ray of frost
- **1st Level** (4 slots): burning hands, magic missile, sleep
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): invisibility, spider climb, suggestion
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): blink, fear, lightning bolt
- **4th Level** (2 slots): blight, confusion

820565c9-ba29-599a-b8c2-f593adc739f8.name: Spellcasting (Wizard Kobold)
820565c9-ba29-599a-b8c2-f593adc739f8.description:
The wizard kobold is an 8th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): fire bolt, minor illusion, poison spray, prestidigitation
- **1st Level** (4 slots): burning hands, mage armor, magic missile, shield
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): hold person, mirror image, misty step
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): blink, counterspell, fireball
- **4th Level** (2 slots): fire shield

attributes.description:
The wizard kobold is an 8th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (at will): fire bolt, minor illusion, poison spray, prestidigitation
- **1st Level** (4 slots): burning hands, mage armor, magic missile, shield
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): hold person, mirror image, misty step
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): blink, counterspell, fireball
- **4th Level** (2 slots): fire shield

2099f5f6-cb37-58e3-9ac3-f3f63b54ffc8.name: Breath of the Visage
2099f5f6-cb37-58e3-9ac3-f3f63b54ffc8.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) damage of the type dealt by the chosen dragon's breath weapon.

attributes.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) damage of the type dealt by the chosen dragon's breath weapon.

2826403a-b802-5635-939e-d3b750df8728.name: Draconic Visage
2826403a-b802-5635-939e-d3b750df8728.description:
The wizard kobold magically creates a draconic visage in an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet. The visage is a glowing, spectral head and neck, resembling a variety of dragon chosen by the kobold, that sheds dim light out to 10 feet. The visage lasts for 1 minute and grants the following benefits: 
* A creature hostile to the wizard who starts its turn within 30 feet of the visage and who is aware of the visage must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to this effect for the next 24 hours. 
* The wizard gains immunity to the damage type dealt by the chosen dragon's breath weapon. 
* When the wizard uses this action, and as a bonus action on it subsequent turns, it can use the following attack:

ac891d7d-a3ea-5f2e-8f37-b1326371b409.description: If the wolpertinger moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

729d0918-9479-5d05-acd1-50caa48535e2.description: The wolpertinger doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

11e313ac-af43-57cc-bff1-5ebba1c25aa7.name: Standing Leap (Wolpertinger)
11e313ac-af43-57cc-bff1-5ebba1c25aa7.description: The wolpertinger's long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

131d0241-2857-54f9-ba8e-d457ba082337.name: Keening
131d0241-2857-54f9-ba8e-d457ba082337.description: The wolpertinger emits a piercing shriek. Each creature within 30 feet that can hear the wolpertinger must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be deafened for 1 minute. A beast with an Intelligence of 4 or lower that is in the area must also succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the beginning of its next turn.

aab6968d-6f18-55d7-be7e-a9e50fde9956.name: Magic Resistance (Wood Golem)

5732a063-63ab-5787-b5d6-0b6cf27cd5a2.name: Fey Touched
5732a063-63ab-5787-b5d6-0b6cf27cd5a2.description: The woodwose has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the woodwose to sleep.

The woodwose's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 12). The woodwose can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: shillelagh
3/day: pass without trace
1/day: entangle

e3be6c46-7aab-546e-bfe1-0514d720e5ab.description: The woodwose can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.

a5339e31-5526-521a-8f89-dc1ca259383d.name: Brave
a5339e31-5526-521a-8f89-dc1ca259383d.description: The wyvern knight has advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

attributes.description: The wyvern knight has advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

14d2c7ed-c5b0-5333-9f47-5eb47bfdfa81.name: Ring of Feather Falling
14d2c7ed-c5b0-5333-9f47-5eb47bfdfa81.description: When the wyvern knight falls while wearing this ring, it descends 60 feet per round and takes no damage from falling.

ad578f27-f8ae-5477-9810-c514c4bc54cd.name: Dagger (Wyvern Knight)

9abaf2c4-f5e1-54c3-9183-271c152d415b.name: Heavy Crossbow (Wyvern Knight)
9abaf2c4-f5e1-54c3-9183-271c152d415b.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d10) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

ede65691-a4ff-5a9f-8b8a-a14b8e978327.name: Lance (Wyvern Knight)
ede65691-a4ff-5a9f-8b8a-a14b8e978327.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. The wyvern knight has disadvantage on attacks with this weapon against creatures within 5 feet of it and can wield this weapon in one hand instead of two while mounted.

24ebbaa7-9a06-583c-ba7f-716f3c5edcc7.name: Multiattack (Wyvern Knight)
24ebbaa7-9a06-583c-ba7f-716f3c5edcc7.description: The wyvern knight makes two lance attacks. If the wyvern knight is riding a war wyvern, its mount can then make one bite, claw, or stinger attack.

da56931d-4e18-560b-a036-08c18b5539dc.name: Protection
da56931d-4e18-560b-a036-08c18b5539dc.description: When a creature the wyvern knight can see attacks a target that is within 5 feet of it, including a creature it is riding, the knight can use a reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. The knight must be wielding a shield.

6115b6e6-417e-5653-bd4d-80357797c328.name: Disguise
6115b6e6-417e-5653-bd4d-80357797c328.description: The xenabsorber has advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks to pass itself off as the type of creature it is impersonating as long as it has at least 1 trait from that creature.

attributes.description: The xenabsorber has advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks to pass itself off as the type of creature it is impersonating as long as it has at least 1 trait from that creature.

d42ed581-a8b4-56c9-9f44-1eaae47fb170.name: Trait Mimicry
d42ed581-a8b4-56c9-9f44-1eaae47fb170.description: As a bonus action, a xenabsorber can take on 1 nonmagical physical trait, attack, or reaction of a beast or humanoid with a challenge rating equal to or less than its own that it has seen within the last week (see Trait Mimicry sidebar). It can have up to 5 such traits at a time, no more than two of which can be attacks. Each trait lasts until the xenabsorber replaces it with another trait as a bonus action. If the xenabsorber goes a week without exposure to a single beast or humanoid, it loses all of its traits and reverts back to its true, blue crystalline form.

925ee1a0-d9a4-5846-bcfd-710b60ffab8e.name: Multiattack (Xenabsorber)
925ee1a0-d9a4-5846-bcfd-710b60ffab8e.description: The xenabsorber makes two melee attacks.

07a9dced-d6d8-5552-91b8-565e671f8d69.name: Evasion (Xiphus)
07a9dced-d6d8-5552-91b8-565e671f8d69.description: If the xiphus is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the xiphus instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

attributes.description: If the xiphus is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the xiphus instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

dcc3934d-b291-54d9-9b6d-ad3156525ebc.name: Lightning Absorption
dcc3934d-b291-54d9-9b6d-ad3156525ebc.description: Whenever the xiphus is subjected to lightning damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the lightning damage dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever the xiphus is subjected to lightning damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the lightning damage dealt.

4f0b7c0e-0f3d-51dc-bf09-dd23c9000781.name: Siphon Time (Recharge 5-6)
4f0b7c0e-0f3d-51dc-bf09-dd23c9000781.description: As a bonus action, a xiphus chooses one creature it can see. The xiphus' clockwork heart vibrates rapidly, bending time to give the xiphus the upper hand against its chosen target. The xiphus chooses whether to have advantage on its attacks against that target or on saving throws against spells cast by the target until the start of the xiphus' next turn.

The xiphus' clockwork heart vibrates rapidly, bending time to give the xiphus the upper hand against its chosen target. The xiphus chooses whether to have advantage on its attacks against that target or on saving throws against spells cast by the target until the start of the xiphus' next turn.

9ef358e9-109b-5004-bcc8-814a3bdea1bb.name: Startling Speed (Xiphus)
9ef358e9-109b-5004-bcc8-814a3bdea1bb.description: The movements of a xiphus are so swift that it is almost invisible when in motion. If the xiphus moves at least 10 feet on its turn, attack rolls against it have disadvantage until the start of its next turn unless the xiphus is incapacitated or restrained.

attributes.description: The movements of a xiphus are so swift that it is almost invisible when in motion. If the xiphus moves at least 10 feet on its turn, attack rolls against it have disadvantage until the start of its next turn unless the xiphus is incapacitated or restrained.

8603f025-7787-5e9d-8f0b-a5cd58eb1472.name: Borrowed Time
8603f025-7787-5e9d-8f0b-a5cd58eb1472.description: If damage is dealt to a xiphus that would kill it, it can attempt to temporarily borrow time from another creature to avoid death. One creature the xiphus can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the xiphus regains hp equal to the damage taken. The target is stable and doesn't die if this effect reduces its hp to 0. After 2 rounds, the xiphus takes necrotic damage, and the target regains hp, equal to the original amount borrowed.

7f1fdfd7-a1ea-511b-9018-385e7a43f184.name: Amorphous (Yaga Goo)
7f1fdfd7-a1ea-511b-9018-385e7a43f184.description: The goo can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The goo can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

8219ce9a-f646-5e04-8634-28d1501749b1.name: Deadly to Fey
8219ce9a-f646-5e04-8634-28d1501749b1.description: The goo has advantage on attack rolls against fey and any creature with the Fey Ancestry trait.

attributes.description: The goo has advantage on attack rolls against fey and any creature with the Fey Ancestry trait.

0e1f62a5-20be-5f95-9a6b-88256c95cb17.name: Spider Climb (Yaga Goo)
0e1f62a5-20be-5f95-9a6b-88256c95cb17.description: The goo can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The goo can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

e4cd23bd-98fa-51ce-a7e2-664bcc612b1c.name: Foul Transit
e4cd23bd-98fa-51ce-a7e2-664bcc612b1c.description: The goo teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 50 feet, leaving behind a wretched puddle in the space it previously occupied. A creature within 5 feet of the space the goo left must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage and become poisoned until the end of its next turn. The first time a creature enters the puddle's space or if a creature starts its turn in the puddle's space it takes 10 (3d6) necrotic damage and is poisoned. The puddle lasts for 1 minute or until the goo that created it is killed.

bf23d573-4dcd-5099-8a14-41f88ca5ca31.name: Pseudopod (Yaga Goo)
bf23d573-4dcd-5099-8a14-41f88ca5ca31.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) necrotic damage.

e11e070a-9a24-5e54-a14b-76c09ba55043.name: Puddle Splash
e11e070a-9a24-5e54-a14b-76c09ba55043.description: When a creature the Yaga goo can see targets it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of the goo, the goo can teleport to a puddle created by its Foul Transit, if that puddle's space is unoccupied, negating the damage from the attack. If it does, the attacker must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage and become poisoned until the end of its next turn.

78e23e5f-6fb9-5855-8acc-6e935822f6c8.name: Resilient Soul
78e23e5f-6fb9-5855-8acc-6e935822f6c8.description: The yakirian has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, or confused, as well as against any effect that causes corruption or madness.

attributes.description: The yakirian has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, or confused, as well as against any effect that causes corruption or madness.

da9fa9a0-9592-595c-89ef-e20c6d3579a2.name: Consume Heart
da9fa9a0-9592-595c-89ef-e20c6d3579a2.description:
The yakiran consumes the heart of a dead humanoid or giant within 5 feet. If the creature also less than 1 minute ago, the yakirian gains the following benefits: 
* The yakirian absorbs the dead creature's knowledge and asks two questions. If the dead creature knew the answers in life, the yakirian learns them instantly. 
* The yakirian's maximum and current hp increase by 10 for 1 hour. 
* The yakirian has advantage on Strength-based attack rolls and ability checks, as well as on all saving throws for 1 hour.

b36d5c16-3507-53d8-bfe6-5f9f4e10f324.name: Amphibious (Yann-An-Oed)
b36d5c16-3507-53d8-bfe6-5f9f4e10f324.description: The yann-an-oed can breathe air and water.

4535594a-3aad-53cf-8d29-63dcc7410c3a.name: Underwater Camouflage (Yann-An-Oed)
4535594a-3aad-53cf-8d29-63dcc7410c3a.description: The yann-an-oed has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.

attributes.description: The yann-an-oed has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.

272366df-6413-5dde-8f90-c9065d4c55fa.name: Bite (Yann-An-Oed)
272366df-6413-5dde-8f90-c9065d4c55fa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage.

a3a3c64e-33b8-560b-92f1-0adc3bd831e5.name: Hoot
a3a3c64e-33b8-560b-92f1-0adc3bd831e5.description: The yann-an-oed emits an owl-like hoot from a blowhole near the top of its head. Each creature within 120 feet that is able to hear the sound must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or return the hooting sound, if it can make noise. The yann-an-oed is able to unerringly track a creature that responds to its call for 1 hour, even if the creature is hidden by magic or on another plane of existence.

94b581dd-f246-565d-91f9-c48a5af91b11.name: Swallow (Yann-An-Oed)
94b581dd-f246-565d-91f9-c48a5af91b11.description: The yann-an-oed makes a bite attack against a Large or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the yann-an-oed, and it takes 7 (2d6) acid damage at the start of each of the yann-an-oed's turns. A yannan-oed can have only one creature swallowed at a time. If the yann-an-oed takes 10 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the yann-an-oed must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the yann-an-oed. If the yann-an-oed dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone.

cbdcfad3-f8e5-5a42-8723-a030df02d004.name: Tentacles
cbdcfad3-f8e5-5a42-8723-a030df02d004.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The yann-an-oed can have only two targets grappled at a time.

15418570-68a3-5cc8-a345-22b564c85883.name: Devouring Swarm
15418570-68a3-5cc8-a345-22b564c85883.description: If a creature has three or more yek attached to it from a bite attack at the end of its turn, the creature must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or its Constitution score is reduced by 1d4 as the demons feast upon the creature's flesh.

652b414d-6285-5a7a-b5fd-e6eb13c2ccf7.name: Bite (Yek)
652b414d-6285-5a7a-b5fd-e6eb13c2ccf7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) piercing damage, and, if the target is Large or smaller, the yek demon attaches to it. While attached, the yek demon can make this attack only against the target and has advantage on the attack roll. The yek demon can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the yek demon by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check.

aced662f-389a-5c82-a2a0-a688c3043d5f.name: Illumination (Young Light Dragon)
aced662f-389a-5c82-a2a0-a688c3043d5f.description: The dragon sheds bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet.

attributes.description: The dragon sheds bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet.

d8c9118e-0cbc-56b6-9e01-9d8b1a79eaed.name: Breath Weapon (Young Light Dragon)
d8c9118e-0cbc-56b6-9e01-9d8b1a79eaed.description:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons:
Radiant Breath. The dragon exhales radiant energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 44 (8d10) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Flaring Breath. The dragon emits a flash of dazzling light from its maw in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be blinded. Undead within the area of effect must also make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be turned for 1 minute. Undead of CR 1 or lower who fail the saving throw are instantly destroyed.

b040bb23-8872-5e2b-81b6-acbb3fd47629.name: Warped Energy Breath (Young Wasteland Dragon)
b040bb23-8872-5e2b-81b6-acbb3fd47629.description: The dragon blasts warped arcane energy in a 40-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 49 (11d8) force damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

29f1969e-ed7f-54b4-82ba-264c63567348.name: Charge (Ziphius)
29f1969e-ed7f-54b4-82ba-264c63567348.description: If the ziphius moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a dorsal fin attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 27 (5d10) slashing damage.

40d8dd08-a201-51bb-8734-bbbbb758ac14.name: Siege Monster (Ziphius)
40d8dd08-a201-51bb-8734-bbbbb758ac14.description: The ziphius deals double damage to objects and structures.

dfb2a149-8ab6-56a6-8f75-f1fad7201196.name: Telepathic Foresight
dfb2a149-8ab6-56a6-8f75-f1fad7201196.description: As a bonus action at the start of its turn, the ziphius can choose one creature within 120 feet that it can see. The ziphius' eyes glow, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or the ziphius creates a temporary mental bond with the target until the start of the ziphius' next turn. While bonded, the ziphius reads the creature's surface thoughts, choosing to either gain advantage on attacks against that target or cause the target to have disadvantage on attacks against the ziphius.

0bf17ebf-751f-53bd-ac4e-fc288b01826a.description: The ziphius can breathe only underwater.

2c00b5fd-9ce0-5615-bce9-329cf9489271.name: Beak (Ziphius)
2c00b5fd-9ce0-5615-bce9-329cf9489271.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be swallowed by the ziphius. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the ziphius, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the ziphius' turns. The ziphius can have only one target swallowed at a time. 

If the ziphius takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the ziphius must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the ziphius. If the ziphius dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

0c0a60a4-5f0a-59fc-9ae4-855baeabc7c3.name: Fire and Light
0c0a60a4-5f0a-59fc-9ae4-855baeabc7c3.description: The zoryas' weapon attacks are magical. When the zoryas hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 radiant or fire damage (included in the attack). The zoryas chooses whether its attack does radiant or fire damage before making the attack roll.

db43bc91-e0a8-5636-b906-e175842372d3.name: Open Celestial Gate
db43bc91-e0a8-5636-b906-e175842372d3.description: As an action, the zoryas opens a gateway to the celestial plane. The gate appears as a shimmering circle that sheds bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet and is framed by twisting, golden strands. The gate lasts 1 hour; though, the zoryas can choose to close it at any time as a bonus action. Once the gate closes, the zoryas is reduced to 0 hp and remains unconscious for six days, awakening, fully restored, at sunrise on the seventh day. The zoryas can't pass through its own gate.

1843d709-7bc4-567c-afe6-ec6a9d67463c.name: Regeneration (Zoryas)
1843d709-7bc4-567c-afe6-ec6a9d67463c.description: The zoryas regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If the zoryas takes necrotic damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the zoryas' next turn. The zoryas' body is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn't regenerate.

7c74989e-3ae6-554e-8d20-94e807ef58b0.name: Sun's Guidance (3/Day)
7c74989e-3ae6-554e-8d20-94e807ef58b0.description: The zoryas has advantage on melee attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

f89c36bc-cf55-5d3b-b94c-b1187621a9ec.name: Dusk's Arrival
f89c36bc-cf55-5d3b-b94c-b1187621a9ec.description: The zoryas' lantern darkens, snuffing out nearby natural and magical sources of light. Each creature within 30 feet of the zoryas must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The area is bathed in darkness like the darkness spell until the end of the zoryas' next turn.

cb6717f0-d433-5c03-992a-3ae8b108ba9f.name: Light of Dawn
cb6717f0-d433-5c03-992a-3ae8b108ba9f.description: The zoryas' lantern brightens, bathing its environs in brilliant light. Each creature within 30 feet of the zoryas must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be blinded for 1d4 rounds. An undead creature who fails this save also takes 13 (3d8) fire damage. The light dispels up to three spells or other magical effects of 3rd level or lower like the dispel magic spell within the area.
